programme.title: Peg + Cat: The Littlest Chicken Problem/ The Election Problem

programme.title: Cyberchase: Hugs and Witches
programme.desc: It's Valentine's Day, and Hacker captures Doctor Marbles and Lady Ada Lovelace, placing them inside a time machine invented by the mathematically minded Lovelace. The kids and Digit must decipher a series of poems left behind by Lady L. to free them.

programme.title: SciGirls: Digging Archaeology
programme.desc: SciGirls Jazzy and Gates uncover 1000-year-old Native American artifacts at a Utah dig site.

programme.title: Nova: Lost Viking Army
programme.desc: Bioarchaeologists investigate a ninth-century mass grave in a rural English village. The remains could unlock the mystery of the 'Great Heathen Army,' a legendary Viking fighting force that once invaded England.

programme.title: History Detectives: Order of Leopold, Suffrage Pennant, WB Cartoon
programme.desc: A contributor wants to know how his father earned the Order of Leopold, the highest military honour bestowed by the Belgian government. A suffragette pennant traces back to the early days of women's liberation.

programme.title: Africa's Great Civilizations: The Atlantic Age/ Commerce and the Clash of Civilizations
programme.desc: Gates explores the impact of the Atlantic world, creating new kingdoms & transatlantic slave trade. Gates explores the dynamism of 19th century Africa and the 'Scramble' for its riches.

programme.title: Breakthrough: The Ideas That Changed the World: The Rocket
programme.desc: Learn the explosive history of the rocket, from its origin in ancient China, to its use as a weapon of war, to how adding hydrogen allowed it to carry astronauts all the way to the moon.

programme.title: Nova: Lost Viking Army
programme.desc: Bioarchaeologists investigate a ninth-century mass grave in a rural English village. The remains could unlock the mystery of the 'Great Heathen Army,' a legendary Viking fighting force that once invaded England.

programme.title: The Woman in White
programme.desc: Sir Percival's secret is exposed, and Walter risks everything for the woman he loves.

programme.title: POV Shorts: Joe's Violin
programme.desc: A violin forges a friendship between a Holocaust survivor and a 12-year-old Bronx school girl.

programme.title: American Masters: Decoding Watson
programme.desc: Meet the Nobel Prize-winning scientist behind the double helix as he confronts his complex legacy. With unprecedented access to James Watson and his family, the film explores his life, achievements, controversies and contradictions.

programme.title: The Gene: An Intimate History
programme.desc: Geneticists wrestle with the moral implications of groundbreaking new technologies that offer both promise and peril. Audrey, a determined young scientist with Spinal Muscular Atrophy, researches a treatment for her own condition.

programme.title: Psych: Dual Spires
programme.desc: Shawn and Gus receive a mysterious email inviting them to the Cinnamon Festival in Dual Spires, a small town nearly invisible on a map. They arrive and become embroiled in the mystery of a teen girl's drowning death.

programme.title: Psych: We Would Like to Thank the Academy
programme.desc: Shawn and Gus help the SBPD solve a case, but are soon reprimanded for their efforts because they did not follow police procedure. As a result, Chief Vick arranges for them to take a three-week crash course at the Police Academy.

programme.title: Psych: Dead Bear Walking
programme.desc: Officials are quick to point the finger at a zoo's polar bear when its trainer is killed unexpectedly, but Shawn believes the animal to be innocent, and becomes an advocate for the bear.

programme.title: Psych: The Polarizing Express
programme.desc: Shawn's antics cause evidence to be thrown out in the prosecution of a known crime lord. It also results in the case being dismissed and the Psych agency and Henry being fired.

programme.title: Psych: Yang 3 in 2D
programme.desc: The Yin/ Yang trilogy comes to a thrilling close as Shawn and Gus race to save a woman kidnapped by Yin. This time, they are forced to use Yang's knowledge of Yin to solve the case and allow her to accompany them on the investigation.

programme.title: Psych: Shawn Rescues Darth Vader
programme.desc: When Shawn finds a dead body while on a mission to retrieve a stolen Darth Vader collector's item from the British Ambassador's son, his credibility as a psychic could be jeopardized if the SBPD learns he saw the body in person.

programme.title: Psych: Last Night Gus
programme.desc: Shawn, Gus, Lassiter and Woody wake up in the Psych Office having no recollection of what happened the night before. When a body shows up dead and all signs point to them, they believe someone drugged them.

programme.title: Psych: This Episode Sucks
programme.desc: Lassiter's new relationship with a mysterious and beautiful woman is placed in jeopardy when Shawn and Gus are convinced she is a murderer.

programme.title: Psych: The Amazing Psych-Man and Tap Man
programme.desc: Shawn and Gus investigate the whereabouts of a masked vigilante who is trying to take down the same local drug syndicate that the SBPD is after.

programme.title: Psych: Dead Man's Curveball
programme.desc: After the hitting coach of Santa Barbara's minor league baseball team mysteriously drops dead, the team's manager hires Psych to investigate and has Shawn go undercover as the new hitting instructor with Gus as the team mascot.

programme.title: Psych: Shawn Interrupted
programme.desc: A billionaire, accused of murdering his assistant, is found 'not guilty' by reason of insanity, causing the SBPD to send Shawn and Gus undercover at the mental hospital he is being held at to prove he lied to the jury and is sane.

programme.title: Psych: In for a Penny...
programme.desc: Juliet's estranged father, a charming con man who wants to mend their broken relationship, visits, but when the opportunity to pull off a dream con is presented to him, he bends his decision to stay on the right side of the law.

programme.title: Psych: The Tao of Gus
programme.desc: When a woman tells the SBPD she witnessed a murder in broad daylight, Shawn and Gus are the only ones who believe her. They protect her by hiding her at a remote ranch, where the residents label themselves as progressive intellectuals.

programme.title: Psych: Neil Simon Lover's Retreat
programme.desc: Shawn and Juliet's romantic getaway vacation from casework and the SBPD is interrupted when their hotel room is robbed and a dead body surfaces at a nearby winery.

programme.title: Psych: Indiana Shawn and the Temple of the Kinda Crappy, Rusty Old Dagger
programme.desc: Despereaux, Shawn and Gus race against an evil gang of thieves to find a mythical dagger that, according to legend, will unlock the hidden treasure of a deceased billionaire.

programme.title: Psych: Heeeeere's Lassie!
programme.desc: When Lassiter moves into a new condominium and strange things start happening to him, he hires Shawn and Gus to figure out what could be causing the supposed paranormal disturbance.

programme.title: Psych: Shawn and the Real Girl
programme.desc: Shawn and Gus go undercover to investigate the attempted murder of a bachelorette-type reality show contestant, where contestants have crossed paths in the past but never actually met.

programme.title: Psych: Let's Doo-Wop It Again
programme.desc: When the founder of Santa Barbara's oldest at-risk youth program is shot and almost killed, Shawn, Gus and a few members of Gus's a cappella group from college investigate to find the culprit.

programme.title: Psych: Autopsy Turvy
programme.desc: After a mortician exposes a mistake that Woody made while performing an autopsy, Shawn and Gus try to learn the body's real cause of death as well as save Woody's job.

programme.title: Psych: True Grits
programme.desc: A chef seeking restitution for his wrongful conviction hires Shawn and Gus to find the actual culprit for whom he spent time in jail.

programme.title: Psych: Santabarbaratown
programme.desc: After more than 20 years of searching, the body of Veronica Towne has been found. Shawn, Gus and Henry reopen the case and revisit the old suspects, including the son of a millionaire who was dating her at the time she went missing.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Lost Traveler
programme.desc: When a Romani child disappears on his way home from school, detectives must interview the distrustful parents. The initial investigation leads them to the head of the Romani community who denies all involvement.

programme.title: Law & Order: Special Victims Unit: Spiraling Down
programme.desc: When a friend of Amaro's reports his daughter missing, detectives find her working as a prostitute. While trying to arrest Johns on rape charges with a minor, they come across a perp who is a football legend.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: From Here to the Pharmacy
programme.desc: A man Blanche has no memory of returns from the Persian Gulf in hopes of fulfilling the promise she supposedly made to him before he left, that she will be his and only his.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Pope's Ring
programme.desc: The Pope's in town and Sophia goes to his mass. When she goes to kiss his ring, it slips off into hers. Meanwhile, Rose is convinced Miles is hiding something from her, so as a birthday gift, Blanche gives Rose a detective to spy on Miles.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Old Boyfriends
programme.desc: Sophia's attempts at trying to find a man go awry when a man she meets through the personals turns out to have a shadow, his sister.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Goodbye, Mr. Gordon
programme.desc: Dorothy is contacted by a high school teacher she once had a crush on. They quickly begin seeing each other and Dorothy is convinced his feelings are genuine.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Commitments
programme.desc: Dorothy asks Blanche to go out with her blind date when she wins tickets to Beatlemania.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Questions and Answers
programme.desc: Dorothy desperately schemes to become a contestant on the game show Jeopardy.

programme.title: Home and Family
programme.desc: Music legend Pat Boone visits. Then, 'Baking with Blondie' Mandy Merriman whips up carrot cake cupcakes for National Carrot Cake Day.

programme.title: Movie: Sister of the Bride
programme.desc: A couple in love have a quick courtship and soon announce their engagement. While the couple are over the moon with the prospect of being married, their families think they are moving too quickly.

programme.title: Movie: Forever in My Heart
programme.desc: Jenna and Charlie found love in Ireland but their dreams drove them apart. Five years later, they reunite and Jenna has to decide where her heart belongs - back home or in the Emerald Isle.

programme.title: Movie: Falling for Vermont
programme.desc: When a best-selling author decides to escape the media, her plan goes awry when she's caught in a thunderstorm and crashes her car. She wakes up with no memory of who she is.

programme.title: The Office: Stress Relief
programme.desc: After Dwight's safety seminar goes awry, he must make amends to the stressed-out office. Michael tries a number of ways to get his employees to relax before learning that he is the number one stressor at work.

programme.title: The Office: Lecture Circuit
programme.desc: Michael goes on a speaking tour of the other branches to explain Scranton's relative success. New party planners Dwight and Jim forget a birthday, with severe consequences.

programme.title: The Office: Lecture Circuit
programme.desc: Michael and Pam continue their tour of the branches with Michael taking a lesson from their visit to Utica. Dwight and Jim struggle to fulfill their new party planning duties with a grumpy staff. Meanwhile, Angela's new cat causes a stir.

programme.title: The Office: Blood Drive
programme.desc: Michael meets a mysterious woman at a Valentine's blood drive. Dwight and Kevin pair up with single women at the office 'Lonely Hearts Party.' Meanwhile, Jim and Pam are banished from the office for being too publicly affectionate.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: April 22, 2020
programme.desc: As the coronavirus keeps millions confined to their homes, Trevor reports on the pandemic from the comfort of his couch, and The World's Fakest News Team weighs in on the crisis from a safe social distance.

programme.title: The Office: Golden Ticket
programme.desc: Michael causes a huge problem in the office when he comes up with the idea to put 'golden tickets' into the paper packages for clients to redeem. Andy, Jim and Pam give Kevin different advice on wooing a woman.

programme.title: The Office: New Boss
programme.desc: Michael has big plans for his 15th anniversary party at Dunder Mifflin, but is in for a shock when the new Vice President has some ideas of his own. Meanwhile, Jim's prank on Dwight has some unexpected results.

programme.title: The Office: Two Weeks
programme.desc: Michael's relationship with the new vice president becomes increasingly tense after he finds excuses to goof off even more than usual. Meanwhile, Pam faces the challenge of a new copier and Kelly develops a crush.

programme.title: The Office: Dream Team
programme.desc: After starting off on the wrong foot with his new supervisor, Jim finds himself face to face with the new boss in a soccer game being held in the Dunder Mifflin parking lot. Meanwhile, Michael, afraid to face the workday, has trouble leaving his house.

programme.title: The Office: The Michael Scott Paper Company
programme.desc: Michael hosts a company luncheon, while Dwight and Andy strike up an unlikely friendship and plan a hunting trip.

programme.title: The Office: Heavy Competition
programme.desc: Dwight's loyalty to Michael is tested when he finds a new hero in Charles. Meanwhile, Andy tries to provide for all of Jim's emotional needs.

programme.title: The Office: Broke
programme.desc: Michael's new company struggles to make early morning deliveries while the office tries to get their expense reports in on time after Angela enforces Dunder Mifflin's policy.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: April 23, 2020
programme.desc: As the coronavirus keeps millions confined to their homes, Trevor reports on the pandemic from the comfort of his couch, and The World's Fakest News Team weighs in on the crisis from a safe social distance.

programme.title: The Office
programme.desc: A documentary-style look at the daily lives of office workers at a mid-sized paper company.

programme.title: South Park: Tweek vs. Craig
programme.desc: The boys instigate a fight between Tweek and Craig in shop class. Meanwhile, Mr. Adler, the shop teacher, is haunted by a recurring dream of his lost love.

programme.title: South Park: Erection Day
programme.desc: The South Park Elementary School Talent Show is coming up and Jimmy can't wait to perform his comedy routine. But first he must find a way to gain control of his raging hormones.

programme.title: South Park: Canada on Strike
programme.desc: The head of the World Canadian Bureau leads the country into a long and painful strike and the responsibility of brokering a settlement rests with the boys.

programme.title: The Daily Show With Trevor Noah: April 23, 2020

programme.title: South Park: Dead Celebrities

programme.desc: Cartman catches the mysterious Gingervitus, a disease that turns his hair red, lightens his skin and gives him freckles. Sick of being ripped-on because of his new looks, Cartman rallies all ginger kids everywhere to fight against discrimination.

programme.title: South Park: The China Problem
programme.desc: With the rest of the American people haunted by the memory of a recent tragic event, only Butters will stand with Cartman as he confronts the Chinese.

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Garrison's Fancy New Vagina
programme.desc: As Mr. Garrison enjoys his new womanly attributes after his sex change, the rest of the town gets in touch with their inner feelings too, living their dreams through surgery.

programme.title: South Park: Gnomes
programme.desc: Cartman, Stan, Kyle and Kenny are assigned to write a report with Tweek, the very nervous and highly caffeinated boy who insists gnomes are stealing his underpants.

programme.title: South Park: Fat Camp
programme.desc: Cartman's family and friends stage an intervention, and force him to trim down. While Cartman's away, Kenny's star is on the rise when he gets his own reality TV show.

programme.title: The Balancing Act: Tips to Do Life Better
programme.desc: Water filtration tips; what you need to know about life insurance; how to get a good night's sleep; Ralph on the Road--meatless meal options.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Two Thirty
programme.desc: When Doug needs dental work, he discovers that Carrie used to have a crush on his dentist.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Arthur, Spooner
programme.desc: Carrie is assigned team leader and discovers that being the boss isn't what she expected.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Window Pain
programme.desc: Carrie drives Doug crazy when she becomes obsessed with impressing the new neighbours.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Holy Mackerel
programme.desc: When Carrie prays for a raise and gets one, she and Doug start praying for more things.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Kirbed Enthusiasm
programme.desc: Doug agrees to try out for a semi-pro football team if Kirby stays on his Peewee team.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Mammary Lane
programme.desc: When Doug's pals make fun of the new shoe girl, Doug tries to make her feel welcome.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Business Affairs
programme.desc: Doug gets jealous of Carrie's gay work buddy and starts worrying about their marriage.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Flame Resistant
programme.desc: Carrie gets jealous when she finds out Doug's ex-sweetheart still visits his mother.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Flash Photography
programme.desc: Doug takes an uninhibited self-portrait as a joke at a friend's wedding.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Connect Four
programme.desc: Carrie wins four Knicks tickets and she struggles to find the perfect couple to join them.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Loaner Car
programme.desc: When Deacon stresses over having a good Thanksgiving, Doug convinces Carrie to help him.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Mentalo Case
programme.desc: The stage is set for a Christmas fiasco when Doug tries to find his favourite boyhood toy.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Jung Frankenstein
programme.desc: Carrie tries to seductively coax Doug's therapist into targeting his many bad habits.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Attention Deficit
programme.desc: Doug's so busy planning his Super Bowl party that he forgets about Carrie's work problems.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Prints Charming
programme.desc: After accidentally picking up another couple's photos, Doug and Carrie feel that their lives are boring.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Animal Attraction
programme.desc: Doug has to transport live penguins to the zoo and has to cancel an evening with Carrie.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Golden Moldy
programme.desc: Doug ignores the mould problem in their house and spends the money on a vacation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: S'poor House
programme.desc: Doug is forced to ask his father for money to help fix their expensive mould problem.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Daughter's Journey
programme.desc: A woman still haunted by her mother's disappearance 20 years before, decides to investigate herself. She finds her mother's old diary and discovers a grisly family secret that could explain just what happened to her mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over a Barrel
programme.desc: A forensic scientist makes history when he uses material from a dentist's office to solve a 10-year-old crime involving an elderly couple that was brutally murdered during a robbery.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen in Time
programme.desc: A young women went missing for three years until someone called to report a suspicious truck in a driveway. The cold trail turned even colder when they found out what was being stored in the truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage
programme.desc: Tracy Jo Shine grew up in a middle-class home in Houston, Texas. Unfortunately, when she attended a prestigious high school she began experimenting with drugs. When she went missing, her family suspected her new friends from school.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Snitch Work
programme.desc: A 4-year-old girl is found murdered, her body placed in a TV box. Years later, a neighbour is arrested for the crime. When an author seeking to write about the death penalty comes across the case, he finds an investigation filled with holes.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Murdered Babysitter
programme.desc: A babysitter is found brutally murdered in Santa Ana, California, with five young children left in the home unscathed. The parents are quick to point to a local transient who had previously burglarized the house.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: A Prison of His Own
programme.desc: Nick Yarris's uncanny knowledge of a gruesome kidnapping and murder makes him a prime suspect and eventually lands him on death row. Twenty years later new evidence emerges.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Trial by Fire
programme.desc: A house erupts into flames on a winter night, killing one person and injuring another. The survivor blamed a kerosene heater for the fire, but the evidence did not match her story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marked for Life
programme.desc: In 1957 the police search for a man who committed several crimes in one night, including murder. Eventually, the case turned cold. Almost fifty years later, with the help of scientific advances, the investigators find their man.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Strong Impressions
programme.desc: The wife of an Air Force officer is found dead in her bed, and authorities initially believe the cause of death to be accidental suffocation by a laundry bag, but further forensic investigation reveals the horrifying truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cereal Killer
programme.desc: Police must search for a boy who goes missing mysteriously after his home burns down and are disheartened when they find his body, but the killer left behind numerous clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Call
programme.desc: A respected surgeon in an upscale waterfront apartment community is murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marathon Man
programme.desc: When a man's body is found near the ranch his family owns, his wife claims he went jogging. But police doubt that story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Fire
programme.desc: Police say that a car crash, which killed an elderly woman, was murder and arson. The driver, the victim’s daughter, insisted it was an accident.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Last Will
programme.desc: A kidnapper torments an abducted girl's family with phone calls.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Making the Collar
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl goes missing, and nine months later, her body is found. Forensic scientists narrow it down to a postal worker with a dog and red carpet, just with the evidence found on the girl's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Financial Downfall
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman is found dead after what seems like a tragic, accidental fall over a cliff. After a closer look at photographs from the scene, police get a new, more sinister theory about the young woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Daughter's Journey
programme.desc: A woman still haunted by her mother's disappearance 20 years before, decides to investigate herself. She finds her mother's old diary and discovers a grisly family secret that could explain just what happened to her mother.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over a Barrel
programme.desc: A forensic scientist makes history when he uses material from a dentist's office to solve a 10-year-old crime involving an elderly couple that was brutally murdered during a robbery.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen in Time
programme.desc: A young women went missing for three years until someone called to report a suspicious truck in a driveway. The cold trail turned even colder when they found out what was being stored in the truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage
programme.desc: Tracy Jo Shine grew up in a middle-class home in Houston, Texas. Unfortunately, when she attended a prestigious high school she began experimenting with drugs. When she went missing, her family suspected her new friends from school.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Tale of the Tape
programme.desc: After a Delaware store clerk is murdered, a local drug dealer confesses to the crime, but there is doubt that what he said on tape can be believed.

programme.title: Morning Express With Robin Meade
programme.desc: A daily dose of news, weather, sports, entertainment, finance and travel, in a fast paced, approachable style.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: A former trouble-maker sits on Ohio death row for killing an elderly couple, while a desperate team of journalists, attorneys, and former law enforcement make the case of his innocence.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Mississippi Mother
programme.desc: Sabrina Butler, a 17-year old woman, arrives at a Mississippi hospital with her baby dead on arrival. Nurses and doctors suspect foul play, and Sabrina cannot give straight answers about what happened to her baby.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: A Woman Wronged
programme.desc: A man is found dead in his home. His 19-year-old son names his hospitalized mother, Michelle Byrom, as the mastermind of the murder. A team of lawyers unearths a history of violence, and a confession that points to an alternate suspect.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sleight of Hand
programme.desc: Investigators search for an assailant who has avoided the law for sixteen years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scratching the Surface
programme.desc: Forensic scientists must find a way to "lift" the serial number from a 12-gauge shotgun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dessert Served Cold
programme.desc: When a Massachusetts man dropped dead of an apparent heart attack, no one thought foul play was a possibility until police looked into his girlfriend’s odd behavior in the days before his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Music Case
programme.desc: The sense of security in Waseca, Minnesota shatters when 12-year-old Cally Jo Larson is found dead in her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: News at 11
programme.desc: Authorities believe that the death of a news anchor is the result of a tragically overzealous fan, but when a police dog tracks the killer back to the crime scene, officers are forced to include the crowd of onlookers in their list of suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Desire
programme.desc: Investigators initially believed a house fire that killed a woman was unintentionally caused by a cigarette, but a closer look by scientists uncovers more to the story.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: The Hunted
programme.desc: A mother of four and a country boy are dropped into the jaguar filled jungle of Belize. While they hunt for food, something is hunting them, and the mental part of the challenge gets to them both.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Lost at Sea
programme.desc: A divemaster and a Navy Seal are, for the first time on Naked and Afraid, stranded at sea. On their arduous journey to land they face exposure to deadly sharks and heatstroke.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Ashes to Ashes
programme.desc: A survival instructor and retiree of the armed forces are inserted into the volcano-ravaged island of Montserrat. With completely different survival styles, they find a way to work together, but one accident single-handedly has an eruptive effect on both.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Nicaragua Nightmare
programme.desc: Two survivalists try to survive for 21 days in the hot and swampy jungles of southern Nicaragua armed with only a machete and a roll of duct tape. But an early tap out leaves one of them left to survive alone for 16 days.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Pop-Up Edition: Mexican Jungle
programme.desc: Two survivalists are back for redemption in the Mexican jungle. Fun and interesting factoids appear on screen as torrential downpours, competing survival styles and a machete accident threaten to send them home early again.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Pop-Up Edition: Baja Desert
programme.desc: Two survivalists take on Mexico's Baja desert. Fun and interesting factoids appear on screen as they deal with triple-digit heat, scarce water, and venomous predators.

programme.title: Rob Riggle: Global Investigator: Really Close Encounters
programme.desc: Is there life in outer space? Rob Riggle is on the case and heads to the Nevada desert, a UFO hotspot. He meets with an ex-CIA agent, Air Force pilots, a professional UFO hunter and a team of investigators.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: From the Ashes
programme.desc: A biology student and an expert survival instructor team up on the swampy shore of Croatia. A strong partnership is forged through braving the elements and facing their demons, but takes a turn for the worst with a freak accident.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Dunes of Despair
programme.desc: A laid back wilderness instructor and his go-getter 'wild child' survival mate are dropped onto the sun-scorched, desolate sand dunes of Brazil. In this bleak landscape of blinding white sand, they battle hunger, dehydration and, ultimately, each other.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Meltdown in Bolivia
programme.desc: Two survivalists are dropped into the merciless jungles of Bolivia. They get severely challenged by flash floods, heat exhaustion and a life-threatening appendicitis attack.

programme.title: Rob Riggle: Global Investigator: Really Close Encounters
programme.desc: Is there life in outer space? Rob Riggle is on the case and heads to the Nevada desert, a UFO hotspot. He meets with an ex-CIA agent, Air Force pilots, a professional UFO hunter and a team of investigators.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Alaska
programme.desc: The Perrins brothers are building an extremely remote log hunting cabin in the heart of the Alaskan Range, in the deep wilderness of Sheep Lake. They have just two weeks to construct an entire single-story cabin.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Mushroom House
programme.desc: Sage Stoneman teams up with world-renowned natural builder SunRay Kelley to experiment with a never-before-used building material: mushrooms! Follow along as they not only design a mushroom-shaped house, but virtually grow one.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Spring Has Sprung
programme.desc: Ervin builds a chicken house from scratch and helps Eve kill a rogue cannibal hen. Jane fishes for king salmon alone while husband Atz hunts for black bears.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Range Riding
programme.desc: Otto and his family rush to gather the winter's hay crop. Elvin and Eve's cannibal hen returns for more.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Poopsicle
programme.desc: Otto gets creative to beat the frozen soil when he realizes he has to move the outhouse.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Spring Has Sprung
programme.desc: Spring has sprung on the homestead. Atz and family head out on a black bear hunt, but as Jane's confidence gets stronger, Atz Sr's waivers. Otto gives CPR to two prematurely born calves. Eve plants the family garden while Eivin takes on her arch nemesis.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Outhouses, Cow Bras and Bears, Oh My!
programme.desc: The Kilchers scramble to make the most of 22 hours of sunlight. Atz tracks down predators killing the herd. Otto gets creative to help a cow with an udder problem. Eivin builds an outhouse. Atz Lee and Jane are startled while fishing for salmon.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: A Prickly Situation

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Marital Maintenance
programme.desc: With winter on their doorstep, the Kilchers race to finish their summer projects. Otto's enormous new project strains his marital bliss. Atz's horse strands him on the range. Eivin works some chicken magic. Atz Lee teaches Jane to fell a tree.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: A Mild Winter
programme.desc: The Kilchers face fallout from the warmest Alaskan winter in decades. Atz Sr., Otto, Atz Lee and Eivin tackle an emergency mission to supply and secure their hunting cabins. Charlotte and Jane search for a missing newborn calf.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Hunting Season Begins
programme.desc: Eve butchers chickens with her children to teach them about the circle of life. Eivin builds a shelter for his trusty horse to protect it from the freeze. Atz Lee and Jane warm up their remote cabin. Atz Sr. goes on a solo hunt in the remote Alaskan wild.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Homestead Haul

programme.desc: When Doug starts hanging out with Joe, a driver at Priority Plus, his fellow drivers lose all respect for him. Later, Doug discovers that Joe was only acting like his friend to get him alone so that he and his fellow drivers could play a trick on Doug.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Acting Out
programme.desc: When Carries decides to put Arthur in a retirement home, Doug is delighted with the prospect of getting his basement back, so he can turn it into a media room. Meanwhile, Danny and Spence refuse to change bedrooms and a classic standoff begins.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Mama Cast
programme.desc: When Carrie asks Doug to find an investment for their tax return, she's shocked when he comes home with his very own ice cream truck. Meanwhile, when Carrie is asked to stand in as a 'mom' at a model home, she starts to warm up to the idea of being a mom.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Affair Trade
programme.desc: Doug panics when he starts receiving sexy phone calls from a woman claiming to have spent a weekend in the Hamptons with him. Meanwhile, Danny attempts to sabotage a potential relationship for Spence when he fears losing his best friend to a woman.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Moxie Moron
programme.desc: Doug takes on a supervisory role at IPS just to prove to Carrie that he's not content with being a driver for the rest of his life. Meanwhile, Carrie decides to show her bosses that she has moxie by complaining about the company holiday gift.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Major Disturbance
programme.desc: While reading a bedtime story to Deacon's son, Doug changes the ending to make it a little scarier and ends up traumatizing the boy. Meanwhile, Arthur offers himself up as a passenger for hire so people can ride in the carpool lane.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Ruff Goin'
programme.desc: When Doug and Carrie are not invited to their block party, Doug makes an appearance to prove they are good people, but ends up having to adopt a dog from his neighbour in order to prove it. Meanwhile, Arthur offers to help Danny with his gambling problem.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Recipe for Death II: Kiss the Cook

programme.desc: The wardens investigate several accidents caused by the mud, including rescuing a boy who was caught in a flash flood. Also, Parker investigates an ATV hit-and-run.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Lost and Found
programme.desc: A new class of wardens are being trained to do search and rescues. A hiker vanishes on the Appalachian trail and the wardens lead one of the largest search and rescue operations in Maine's history to find her.

programme.title: North Woods Law: 24 Hours on the Job
programme.desc: Follow several wardens during a busy 24 hours as they patrol for poachers, tag black bears at night, search for a home invader with a K9 team, and respond to a search and rescue.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Down to the Wire
programme.desc: The tail end of deer season tempts empty-handed hunters to break the law. The wardens work round the clock shifts to catch a night hunter and a family of armed felons. Spahr and Blanchard investigate a pair of deer shot under suspicious circumstances.

programme.title: North Woods Law: And the Little Ones Too
programme.desc: The discovery of a dead beaver in a Skowhegan parking lot leads Warden Parker on an exhaustive investigation involving surveillance cameras, anonymous informants and the assistance of the local police.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Above and Beyond
programme.desc: For a game warden, there's no such thing as being off the clock. Wardens McBrine and Carter embark on a multi-day hunt for a wanted man. Warden Herring investigates a mysterious shack on city property. Warden McKenney works to remove a deadly hazard.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Long Shot
programme.desc: Simmons, Parker and Robertson catch sportsmen who fired from inside their truck. Spahr leads the search for a missing elderly woman in York County. The dive team is mustered to search for two duck hunters presumed drowned in the Sebasticook River.

programme.title: North Woods Law: In a Hot Second
programme.desc: On land and water, it's the wardens' job to keep people safe. Warden McBrine coordinates a LifeFlight helicopter for the victim of a serious car crash. Warden Buuck spreads the word on boating safety.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Crossed Wires
programme.desc: McKenney and Robertson investigate a night hunting complaint. MacCabe tracks an illegal bear kill back to the source. K9 Tundra takes the lead in the harrowing search for a missing elderly man with dementia.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Dead Moose Talking
programme.desc: The wardens wage a large-scale investigation into a moose that's been shot and left in the woods. A camouflaged ATV leads Warden Richardson to a convicted felon. Warden MacCabe runs across a hunter unlike any other.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Roughest and Toughest: Crab Trap
programme.desc: On the Northwestern Jake gets a whiplash-style captaining lesson from Sig. A long trip and a prank threaten Captain Johnathan's catch on the Time Bandit.

programme.title: Movie: The Perfect Match
programme.desc: A playboy is surprised to find himself wanting more from his casual relationship.

programme.title: Movie: Baggage Claim
programme.desc: With her younger sister's wedding fast approaching, a flight attendant makes it her mission to find a suitable fiancé in 30 days.

programme.title: Movie: Stomp the Yard
programme.desc: A gifted dancer is sent to college, where he catches the attention of two fraternities trying to win the annual 'step' contest.

programme.title: Martin: Go Tell It on the Martin
programme.desc: A distraught man with a bomb strapped to him takes over the station during Martin's show.

programme.title: Martin: 'Xpress Yourself
programme.desc: Gina regrets the changes she was hired to make in Martin's show when Martin changes too.

programme.title: Martin: Sophisticated Ladies
programme.desc: Gina and Pam's dreams of joining an exclusive women's club are jeopardized by Sheneneh.

programme.title: Martin: Ain't Nuttin' Goin' on But the Rent
programme.desc: Martin and the gang stick out the weather after his landlord cuts off the heat.

programme.title: Martin: The Ex-Files
programme.desc: Gina and Martin go out to dinner with their ex-lovers to see who would be more jealous.

programme.title: Martin: All the Players Came
programme.desc: Martin organizes a fundraiser to help save a failing theater in the neighborhood.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Granny Gets Busy
programme.desc: Philip's widowed mother spends more time with the handyman when visiting Bel-Air.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Guess Who's Coming to Marry

programme.title: The Parkers: Breaking Up Is Hard to Do

programme.title: The Parkers: The Oddest Couple
programme.desc: Nikki moves in with Professor Oglevee, who is depressed about Veronica's engagement.

programme.title: The Parkers: Reunited

programme.title: The Parkers: J.C. Bowl
programme.desc: Nikki helps Professor Oglevee assemble a winning team so he can beat his long-time rival.

programme.desc: Online shopping becomes an addiction for Cora; Brown starts digging for treasure in his backyard after finding an artifact.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet the Patience

programme.desc: T, Kim and Nikki decide to try making money by selling T-shirts with a catchy slogan.

programme.title: The Parkers: Scary Kim

programme.title: Black-ish: One Angry Man
programme.desc: Dre is forced to participate in jury duty after Junior responds to the summons that was thrown away. The case is supposed to be open and shut, but when Dre sees that the defendant is a young African American, he feels responsible to give him a fair trial.

programme.title: Black-ish: ToysRn'tUs
programme.desc: Janine gives Diane a white Girlstory doll for her birthday, and when Bow tries to return it for a black doll, she is shocked by the limited options offered.

programme.title: Black-ish: Manternity
programme.desc: Dre considers taking paternity leave after he realizes that Zoey is arguably the best child and their bond developed while he was unemployed when she was born. Meanwhile, Bow tries to hide her pregnancy in order to get a promotion.

programme.title: Black-ish: Richard Youngsta
programme.desc: Dre is excited about doing a campaign with a popular rap star but becomes conflicted when Bow and Ruby provide feedback suggesting it plays on stereotypes. Meanwhile, Bow is determined to get the family to stop eating so much take-out food.

programme.title: Black-ish: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: Dre's sister Rhonda is in town, and he feels a little jealous of her close relationship with Pops. Dre and Bow urge Zoey to take Junior to a high school party, and things get out of hand.

programme.title: Black-ish: Sister, Sister
programme.desc: Bow's sister comes to town after filming a stint on a reality show, and they couldn't have less in common. Meanwhile, Zoey suggests that Dre spend more time with Junior since she’s leaving for college, and Jack and Diane decide to rebrand themselves.

programme.title: Black-ish: All Groan Up
programme.desc: When Zoey gets into several colleges around the country, Dre and Bow begin to feel worried and sentimental. They reflect back on memories they've had with the family and wonder what life will be like without her around all the time.

programme.title: Black-ish: Liberal Arts
programme.desc: Dre tearfully drops Zoey off to college for her two-day orientation, and she hits it off with fellow incoming freshman Miriam after they ditch the campus tour. They are smitten upon meeting Aaron, who is running the Black Student Union booth.

programme.title: Black-ish: Sprinkles

programme.desc: A husband and wife in Chicago have big differences in their dreams for a home. Unwilling to compromise or move out of his comfort zone, he hires his old college buddy to be their real estate agent hoping it will give him an edge.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Beachside Beauty
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a home in Torrance, California, that's just miles from the ocean and several upscale beach communities. The yard is small and tiered, but buyers in this area demand luxury and are willing to pay top dollar to get it.

programme.title: Flip or Flop: Backyard Staycation
programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a home in Riverside, California, with a massive backyard. It has great views and room to create a pool and outdoor living area fit for a five-star resort.

programme.desc: Tarek and Christina get a lead on a home in Garden Grove, California, that is in need of a major makeover. The house is small and needs a lot of work, but it does have a large yard where they could add an extra bathroom or bedroom.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Shell Shocked
programme.desc: A veteran bomb-sniffing Labrador retriever develops severe symptoms of PTSD after a stint in Iraq. Will Cesar be able to help this heroic canine?

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Scared Straight
programme.desc: Cesar Millan blends his brand of canine communication with tough love to curb problems.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Home Alone
programme.desc: Ed McMahon has a snarling wheaten terrier; an adopted beagle won't leave the house; and an Australian shepherd won't let anyone in.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Why Dogs Fight
programme.desc: Cesar reveals how dogs communicate through their energy and body language, to help resolve a potentially disastrous situation.

programme.title: The Dog Whisperer: Triple Dog Trouble
programme.desc: Cesar Millan blends his brand of canine communication with tough love to curb problems.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: The Incredible Mr. Quackerson
programme.desc: Dr. Pol, his son Charles and Dr. Brenda try to keep up with an onslaught puppies, kittens and calves before operating on two 1,600 pound cows.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Pol Speed Ahead
programme.desc: Dr. Pol and Charles rush to save a mother mare and foal and then help a dog with a badly slit throat.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Goats Gone Wild
programme.desc: Dr. Pol keeps busy as the unofficial vet for the town's county fair. The clinic helps Timmy, a goat with a blocked esophagus and Cooter, a hound dog with a bite from battling with another dog.

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Raging Bulls
programme.desc: Charles is determined to upgrade the computer system at the clinic while Dr. Pol deals with escaping cattle, a wobbly dog that won’t stop walking in circles and an alligator with an attitude.

programme.title: Megapiranha
programme.desc: Scientists try to find out what the ancient Megapiranha would have been capable of by catching and studying its modern-day relatives.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Rock
programme.desc: A hidden, subterranean city built within the Rock of Gibraltar was an immense fortress to control the seas during World War II, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of a long-lost chamber with evidence of high-stakes espionage.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Ghosts of the Hell Maze
programme.desc: A labyrinth of vast tunnels in the French countryside has served as a secret hideout during wartime for centuries, and on its walls, experts have discovered the final confessions of soldiers who fought here during one of the deadliest days of World War I.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Secrets of the Doomsday Caves
programme.desc: A vast network of subterranean bunkers in the American west was home to the power to destroy nations, but today, this facility is deserted, and new discoveries reveal why this eerie place was built and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Hell on Blood Island
programme.desc: An island of dense jungle is home to an abandoned complex with a dark past of bloodshed and rebellion, and new discoveries at this deserted place reveal why it was built and the gruesome circumstances of its downfall.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Florida Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: A strange bunker near the Kennedy Space Center once served a top-secret military function should doomsday ever come to the Sunshine State. Experts use declassified intel to reveal the sinister purpose of this forbidding facility and why it was abandoned.

programme.title: Black Files Declassified: How to Stop an Assassination
programme.desc: Newly declassified document reveal the details of a top-secret government program created in the wake of the Kennedy assassination to go to extreme lengths to protect the president. A former CIA operative exposes the cutting-edge defenses now in place.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Journey to Outcast Island
programme.desc: On a desolate island near Greece, abandoned buildings are evidence of a group of people that were forbidden to leave. Experts reveal who was forced to stay here and if there was a cover-up to conceal what really happened at this strange place.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Florida Doomsday Castle
programme.desc: A strange bunker near the Kennedy Space Center once served a top-secret military function should doomsday ever come to the Sunshine State. Experts use declassified intel to reveal the sinister purpose of this forbidding facility and why it was abandoned.

programme.desc: An island of dense jungle is home to an abandoned complex with a dark past of bloodshed and rebellion, and new discoveries at this deserted place reveal why it was built and the gruesome circumstances of its downfall.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Tesla Conspiracy
programme.desc: Explore what happened to a cutting-edge research complex built by a visionary genius, an ambitious Nazi project that met a sinister end, and a Cold War relic that changed history.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Phantoms of Chernobyl
programme.desc: Some of the world's most incredible engineering projects are now deserted. Explore what happened to the large town located just outside of Chernobyl on the eve of disaster, a fleet of ghost ships, and a dangerous mountain road that changed history.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Nazi Ghost Town
programme.desc: Revisit a Soviet megastructure, a massive Nazi brainwashing complex, and a dangerous desert pass to find out how they were built and why they were mysteriously abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Curse of Hell Island
programme.desc: Explore a ghost town that was once a dangerous industrial hellscape, a giant warship at the bottom of the ocean, and a top secret relic that could have changed the Cold War.

programme.title: Cash Cab: Not in My Cab
programme.desc: A group of riders are put to the test by special guests, 'Property Brothers' Drew and Jonathan Scott, a couple from Long Island look to Social Media for help and a group of friends try and recount what they learned in school to stay alive in the cash cab.

programme.title: Cash Cab: Mean Streets
programme.desc: Ben puts a father and son team to the test with the help of special guest star Andrew Zimmern, of 'The Zimmern List,' Ben experiences a cash cab first during a street shout out, and one rider receives the ultimate Birthday present.

programme.title: Cash Cab: Man v. Cab
programme.desc: Blood is shed in the name of trivia when a contestant nearly breaks his nose in a moment of celebration, 'Man v. Food' host Casey Webb makes a special guest appearance, and Ben makes dreams come true for two brothers who get their chance in the cash cab.

programme.title: Cash Cab: All Hail the Cash Cab
programme.desc: Two coworkers learn the hard way that not even Siri can help them, a mother and Son try their luck as their Cash Cab doomsday clock runs down.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Snack Bar
programme.desc: Alfonso explores some snack bar treats, starting with cool and refreshing Junior Mints and their signature dimple. For dessert on the go, find out about Nemo's carrot cake squares and Tasty Kate's individual cherry pies.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Sweet Sensations
programme.desc: Algonso gets a sweet sensation from treats like the iconic Sugar Daddy, colorful Warheads Chewy Cubes, and the luscious Milk Chocolate with Caramel Squares from Ghirardelli.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Movie Munchies
programme.desc: It's movie munchies madness as host Alfonso Ribeiro goes behind the scenes of blockbuster sweets like Dots and Cookie Dough Bites.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Backyard Cookout
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro reveals the secrets behind heat-and-eat barbecue from Farm Rich Smokehouse, the super yellow color of French's Mustard and the sweet-sour punch of Mt. Olive Bread and Butter Pickles.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Nostalgic Eats
programme.desc: Host Alfonso Ribeiro takes your taste buds back in time to see how the classic Necco Wafers are made.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Flavor Infusion
programme.desc: Alfonso has the inside information on what makes some treats so tasty, from the iconic Andes Mints to Christie's chocolate cookies. Then, see how snacks like Taffy Town's cotton candy taffy and Ole Smoky Tennessee Moonshine pack so much serious flavors.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Crunchy
programme.desc: Host Alfonso Ribeiro explores snacks that know how to put that little crunch in your munch, like See's Candies peanut brittle and Snak King's crispy Taco Litos.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Barbecue Sides
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro puts together the perfect backyard barbecue, including Mrs. Freshley's melt-in-your-mouth cupcakes, Mrs. Fisher's perfectly-salted rippled chips, and Mayfield Dairy's creamy banana split ice cream.

programme.title: How It's Made: Inflatable Safety Devices/ Braille Typewriters/ Carbon Fibre Cellos
programme.desc: Witness the construction of inflatable safety devices, Braille typewriters and carbon fibre cellos.

programme.title: How It's Made: Fire Extinguishers, Doughnuts, Shock Absorbers and Banjos
programme.desc: Features fire extinguishers, doughnuts, shock absorbers and banjos.

programme.title: Deadly Women: The Takers
programme.desc: All of us would like a little extra cash, but only a few are prepared to steal a life to get it.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Granny Gets a Gun
programme.desc: A woman disapproves of her granddaughter's new boyfriend and plots to eliminate him.

programme.title: Deadly Women: Kill the Competition
programme.desc: In the game of love the stakes are high not everyone can be a winner.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Almost Got Away With It
programme.desc: Timothy Bass had gotten away with murder for decades, telling his wife, Gina, that he enjoyed working the night shift to make extra money. For years, Gina believed him until she uncovered his secret and was left wondering what evil her husband had done.

programme.title: If I Should Die: Saint or Strangler
programme.desc: Eighteen-year-old Hae Min Lee vanishes one day after school, only to be discovered strangled in a park a month later. Her diaries offer a chronicle of her love life, and guide police to a shocking arrest still highly contested to this day.

programme.title: Predator at Large: It Was A Thrill To Him
programme.desc: Women are bring murdered in Washington County, Oregon. A serial killer is one step ahead of the police. The community lives in fear. But only after more bloodshed do residents discover that the brutal killer has been living in plain sight all along.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Twisted Plan
programme.desc: When trusted legal assistant Gail Spencer fails to show up for work, her coworkers are rightfully concerned. But as the sordid details of her abduction come to light, suddenly it seems like someone at the office may know more than they are letting on.

programme.title: If I Should Die: Saint or Strangler
programme.desc: Eighteen-year-old Hae Min Lee vanishes one day after school, only to be discovered strangled in a park a month later. Her diaries offer a chronicle of her love life, and guide police to a shocking arrest still highly contested to this day.

programme.title: Predator at Large: It Was A Thrill To Him
programme.desc: Women are bring murdered in Washington County, Oregon. A serial killer is one step ahead of the police. The community lives in fear. But only after more bloodshed do residents discover that the brutal killer has been living in plain sight all along.

programme.title: Your Worst Nightmare: Domestic Disturbance
programme.desc: With a new home and loving fiancé, single mom Lisa Filiaggi finally feels like luck is on her side. That is until troubles from her past come back to haunt her and threaten to destroy all her future plans.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Our Secret Identity
programme.desc: As a child, Pam Jacobs spent years of her life on the run from the law. But she had no idea that her father, Charles Sinclair, was a wanted man until the day the FBI caught up with them.

programme.title: I Am Homicide: What the Toddler Saw
programme.desc: When a young mother is ambushed and shot dead in the driveway of her home in Charlotte, NC, Homicide Detective Garry McFadden's best witness may be a three-year-old child her son, who gives the detective a key, but cryptic clue.

programme.title: I Am Homicide: Murder Becomes Personal
programme.desc: A case becomes personal for Charlotte, North Carolina Homicide Detective Garry McFadden when a friend becomes a murder victim. It gets doubly personal when the killer also turns out to be someone close to him.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Living in Sin
programme.desc: A Christian woman's faith is tested when she falls in love with a charming new female co-worker. As the forbidden lovers fight for their love in a community that doesn't want them, the pressure proves too much, and the consequences are deadly.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: The Sum of Love
programme.desc: A friendship between a math teacher and assistant principal turns into a connection far deeper. But when a possessive estranged husband threatens their relationship and their safety, the pair take drastic measures to protect themselves against him.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Broken Trust
programme.desc: A teen girl with big ambitions of becoming a cop falls hard for the charm of an NYPD officer. He promises to make all her dreams come true but when affairs of the heart are complicated by the letter of the law.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Love and Dishonor
programme.desc: When Montreal teen Zainab Shafia meets Ammar Wahid, it's love at first sight. But their relationship is forbidden by her strict father and he'll stop at nothing to ensure his daughter obeys his rules of honor.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: A Mother's Nightmare
programme.desc: A teen girl forbidden from dating falls hard for an older man. In a desperate bid to be with him, she runs away from home. But young love soon turns to fatal obsession.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: To Love, Honor, and Kill
programme.desc: Noor and Marwan, young Iraqi American teens from feuding households, fall in love despite Noor's family's opposition.

programme.title: Forbidden: Dying for Love: Be My Savior
programme.desc: A teenage girl forbidden by her parents to date is swept off her feet by an older man. They vow to keep their whirlwind romance secret at all costs but when an unplanned pregnancy threatens to derail their plans, they take drastic action.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Fear the Ether Man
programme.desc: A serial rapist known as the Ether Man lurks in the shadows of Albuquerque, New Mexico. Victims can't identify the masked attacker and worse still, it looks like he's expanding his hunting grounds.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Yes, Master.
programme.desc: When an aspiring kindergarten teacher in Dublin, Ireland goes missing, her family assumes depression over her mother's death drove her to suicide. They never suspected the real reason – involving a twisted BDSM master gone horribly wrong.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Fatal Fixation
programme.desc: When Ignacio Garraus meets Shawna Nelson, there's instant heat – despite them both being married to other people. While he's just looking for a good time, she's falling in love.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Never Coming Home
programme.desc: A mother and her two young sons vanish in rural Wyoming, prompting a nationwide search. Leads dry up and the case goes cold... until a dark secret is revealed, leading investigators to another homicide they had no clue could solve four murders.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: In 1941, Hitler has thrown himself into a fight to the death against Stalin. Two decades earlier, in 1917, Joseph Jughashvili from Georgia is a member of Lenin's Bolshevik Party, who has just seized power in Russia. The country is torn by civil war.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: After blocking the Germans right outside of Moscow, Stalin now faces Hitler's second assault. The world's fate will be decided in Stalingrad. Like in Leningrad, men, women, and children are plunged into hell and sacrificed.

programme.title: Apocalypse: Stalin
programme.desc: The Soviets continue on the path to towards liberation. On the road to Berlin, they discover the horror of Hitler's extermination camps. Fifteen years earlier, Stalin transformed his country using every means at his disposal.

programme.title: Weaponology: Frags, Pineapples, and RPG's
programme.desc: Weaponology traces the history of portable firepower. This family of weapons pack an explosive punch, but can be carried and operated by small infantry units.

programme.title: Weaponology: Fighter
programme.desc: Exploring the development of engine power, wings, maneuverability and ejection systems, find out how fighter jets now rule the land and sky.

programme.title: Weaponology: Sniper Rifles
programme.desc: Centuries of technological innovation have resulted in the creation of rifles that can kill a man from 2,000 yards. The history of bullets, guns, sights, mechanisms, camouflage and tactics is revealed.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Godfather of London
programme.desc: Billy Hill was the most powerful Kingpin in Britain's post-war underworld, but the secret behind Hill's empire is little known.

programme.title: Wartime Crime: The Sicilian Connection
programme.desc: Incensed by their treatment under Mussolini's regime and anxious to re-establish their European criminal network, a number of mafioso, including incarcerated kingpin Charles 'Lucky' Luciano, offered their full support to American intelligence officers.

programme.title: Al Capone: Public Enemy #1
programme.desc: America's first superstar gangster, Al Capone, dominated headlines and is said to be responsible for the bloody St Valentines' Day Massacre. After being made the face of organized crime by US government Capone's public image brings about his downfall.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Merchant of Death

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Pool With a View
programme.desc: Paul and Brian learn the hard way that it isn't always so sunny in California as they transform an odd-shaped outdoor space into an elevated pool with an ocean view.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Magnificent Mediterranean Pool
programme.desc: This pool is so extraordinary it takes over a year to build. From a 60-foot pool and a 14-foot spa to a hand-carved Italian marble fountain, the kinds pull out all the stops to give a family a piece of the Mediterranean.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Hawaiian Paradise Pool
programme.desc: Hawaii may be 3,000 miles away, but the kings are able to recreate the island paradise right outside this family's door. They turn the Ritters' old yard into a luxurious lagoon and give them a dreamy spot to make lots of new memories.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Cliffside Dreams
programme.desc: A couple with a crew of rambunctious kids and a dream house in San Antonio is in desperate need of a pool. The kings design an expansive pool with a Baja shelf, swim-up bar, giant infinity edge and massive two-storey deck to enjoy the view.

programme.title: Pool Kings: A Natural Fit for a Fun Family
programme.desc: After moving to their forever home, a young family from College Grove, TN, is ready to build their dream pool. The Pool Kings accept the challenge, creating a tropical paradise with a massive waterfall, a swim-up bar and an oversized outdoor kitchen.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Something for Everyone
programme.desc: A family in San Antonio, Texas, is remodeling their home and they want a custom pool that has something for everyone. Paul and Tony design a 13-foot-high, split-level pool with a baja shelf for Mom and plenty of entertainment space for Dad.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Welcome to the Jungle

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Top of the Mountain

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Paradise on the Bay
programme.desc: A couple from Snead Island, Florida asks the Lucas Lagoons crew to create a bayside paradise. This outdoor living space, pool, spa, fire feature and kitchen will be built without any of Lucas' signature rock work.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: For the Birds
programme.desc: A multi-generational, environmentally conscious family living in a designated bird sanctuary in Osprey, FL asks design expert Lucas Congdon to create both a human pool paradise and a bird pond oasis, all in one outdated, rundown backyard.

programme.title: Containables: Deadlines and Due Dates
programme.desc: Jon and Kristen design a three-container structure in the Smoky Mountains of North Carolina. Dealing with tricky terrain and inclement mountain weather, the team enlists their families' help to install bowling alley wood countertops, patio doors and more.

programme.title: Containables: Containers of Staggering Size
programme.desc: Jon and Kristen want to change the way people think about container living and start by tackling their biggest build yet. They stagger two 40-foot containers and open the walls between them to create a massive great room.

programme.title: Containables: Hurricanes and Golf Balls
programme.desc: Jon and Kristen design and build a container home for a local couple's adopted son and fill it with fun features like a lofted bed, hydraulic TV winch and an outdoor fire pit. A second container has a custom workshop and a rooftop driving range.

programme.title: Containables: A Great Room With Great Views
programme.desc: Jon and Kristen raise the bar by taking on their biggest container home yet for a homeowner who wants a home where her entire family can bunk down and enjoy the amazing views her property affords.

programme.title: Containables: Stacking the Decks to a T
programme.desc: Jon and Kristen are eager to begin work on a very special container home that combines a unique design with the scenic beauty of South Texas. The home consists of three containers stacked to create a cantilevered look with multi-level decks.

programme.title: Containables: Container Home Away From Home
programme.desc: Jon and Kristen work to build a container home for the in-laws when they come to visit their new grandson. With only four weeks to complete the project, the couple must must tackle 20-foot and 40-foot containers.

programme.title: Tiny Paradise: Shepherd's Wagon Tiny House
programme.desc: A couple designs a tiny wagon home so they can live a nomadic lifestyle.

programme.title: Tiny Paradise: Tiny Hawaiian Hideaway
programme.desc: After feeling the need to downsize and live simply, a woman and her best friend decide to build a tiny home in the jungle paradise of Hilo, HI. While their dreams of a tiny Hawaiian hideaway are big, both lack adequate construction experience.

programme.title: Tiny Paradise: Tiny Natural Tropical Refuge
programme.desc: A furniture builder and master craftsman use foraged and reclaimed materials to build a special indoor-outdoor tiny house for his family of four in Kauai.

programme.title: Tiny Paradise: Tiny Jungle Paradise
programme.desc: A Denver couple is moving to their own personal paradise in Mexico, where they hope to connect with nature and live a more relaxed lifestyle in the jungles of Tulum. They're going tiny and have designed an amazing house with plenty of outdoor space.

programme.title: Tiny Paradise: Tiny House on the Quarry
programme.desc: This large family of eight loves spending time outside on their ten acres of land in Rolla, MO.

programme.title: Tiny Paradise: Tiny Lakeside Getaway
programme.desc: A young couple in Lakeside, Montana, is downsizing to a tiny cabin in the woods. Set against a gorgeous backdrop, this cozy A-frame cabin offers a skylight for stargazing, a suspended hammock bed, a stone fireplace and hidden art storage.

programme.title: Restored: 1923 Mediterranean Revival
programme.desc: Brett's new clients recently purchased their first home together, a 1923 Mediterranean Revival, and want to restore it after years of small updates from the previous owners.

programme.title: Restored: The Riverside Transitional Craftsman Bungalow
programme.desc: Brett restores a Craftsman bungalow for a woman who had started the project with her late husband, but never finished. The homeowner is overwhelmed when she sees the house finally returned to its original beauty.

programme.title: Restored: 1915 Arts And Crafts
programme.desc: Brett Waterman gets the chance to restore an enormous Arts and Crafts home with six bedrooms for a family that grew from four children to eight children in just two years.

programme.title: Restored: 1940s Modern Ranch
programme.desc: Brett restores a 1941 modern ranch in Redlands, CA, for a couple who recently inherited the home from her grandfather.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Hot Doggin'
programme.desc: Noah visits Maryland for a crab dip smothered dog; California for a cheesy, spicy Chile Relleno dog and a dessert dog covered in whipped cream and chocolate.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Everything's Better With Bacon
programme.desc: Everything's better with bacon and Noah Cappe is here to prove it. Noah travels to festival and fairs across the country, Noah finds the biggest, baddest and best bacon dishes around.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: In the Last Place You'd Expect
programme.desc: Sometimes the best dishes are in the last place you'd ever expect to find them. We've scoured the globe, searched far and wide, and the hunt stops here. Alex Guarnaschelli ends the debate over where to find the best bagel -- it's in North Yarmouth, Maine!

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Worth the Wait
programme.desc: Alton Brown talks up his favorite beef Wellington, while Jamika Pessoa melts over buttery biscuits.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Chocolate Bliss
programme.desc: When it comes to chocolate, the possibilities for sweet treats are endless. On the ultimate list of the best chocolate treats in America, Ali Khan devours an unbelievable Dark Truffle Cake from San Antonio, Texas.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: On the Waterfront
programme.desc: Head outside for the best of both worlds: breathtaking scenery with fresh air, clear skies and the most-incredible waterfront dining in the U.S. Anne Burrell adores the sights with a meaty pasta from Cecconi's Dumbo in Brooklyn, N.Y.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Dawn of the Bread
programme.desc: Noah Cappe cruises up the west coast, starting at the Columbia County Fair in St. Helens, Ore. First up is a traditional Indian fry bread stuffed with some non-traditional ingredients, then Noah dives into the coastal fusion of the great Pacific pita.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Meat, Pray, Love
programme.desc: Noah Cappe starts at the Delaware State Fair, where he'll eat the very stately Delaware Dog, a hot dog loaded with scrapple. Then, he'll try to tackle the funnel cake-filled Frankenfunnel Burger and the octopus-loaded Octotaco.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Zacho Libre
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to Charlotte, Mich. for the Eaton County Fair, where he takes a swing at the PB battered burger, then goes coco-nutty for the pina colada shrimp tacos.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Jurassic Pork
programme.desc: Noah Cappe bites into some classic Tennessee hot chicken, tastes authentic home cooking with Meme's meatloaf sammy, and samples a pair of sinfully sweet fusion treats.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: More Than I Can Count!
programme.desc: Some special dishes are so good you can enjoy them over and over again. Andrew Zimmern has lost count of how many times he's indulged in the infamous barbecue chicken from Miss Myra's Pit Bar-B-Que in Birmingham, Ala.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Best Meal Deal
programme.desc: You don't have to sacrifice incredible food experiences in order to save a buck. Antonia Lofaso keeps her wallet full with irresistible Mexican munchies in Venice Beach, Calif., Duff Goldman saves a ton as he takes on the enormous Orca Platter.

programme.title: The Best Thing I Ever Ate: Voted "Most Popular"
programme.desc: We're sharing seven of the most popular go-to dishes from restaurants across the country.

programme.desc: Rogers checks out the best rich, hearty, home-style cooking straight from the South.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: The Best, Best Friend / Counting Kermits
programme.desc: When he fears he's losing his BFF, Fozzie tries to prove he's Kermit's BEST best friend. Bunsen and Beaker invent a Make-Another-You-Inator to help Kermit play four games at once.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Puggy-ology/ Squirrels Just Wanna Have Fun
programme.desc: The pugs travel to an archeology site to find artifacts for Bob's sister. Then, when a noisy squirrel keeps Bob from getting work done, the pugs must work together to get the squirrel back to its family.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Ski Trippin'!/ My Fair Pete
programme.desc: On a winter ski trip with her friends, Daisy remembers that she doesn't know how to ski! Pete is worried that he won't be able to impress his Mama when she comes for a visit.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Animal Antics/ Here, Kitty, Kitty, Kitty!
programme.desc: The gang converts their roadsters into their favorite animals; Heist's kitty runs away.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Back to Cool/ Baby Breakdown
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy deliver a baby Penguin to Pip's hometown. When Pip and Freddy break the conveyor belt at T.O.T.S. they are determined to fix it on their own.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A Seat at the Theatre/ Bye Bye Butterfly
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly help a butterfly get home to its family in Mexico. The pugs push Bob's office chair to a theater to see his favorite play.

programme.title: Vampirina: Vamp-iversary/ Wolf Boy
programme.desc: It’s Boris and Oxana's anniversary, and no one is more excited to celebrate her parents than Vee. The Hauntleys have a new guest at the Scare B&B: a wolf boy named Fangbert!

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Bringing Back Baby/A Penguin In The Desert
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy show Peggy, the Polar Bear, the benefits of having a baby brother when she tries to return him to T.O.T.S. Pip and Freddy brave the desert heat to deliver a camel.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: You've Gotta Be Kitten Me / Whale, Hello There
programme.desc: On Pip and Freddy’s first day, they deliver a kitten who mistakes them as her parents. When there is a two-ton baby whale delivery, the fliers compete in a fly-off for the task.

programme.title: Bluey: Trampoline/ The Dump/ Zoo
programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want to play games on the trampoline with Dad; Dad, Bluey and Bingo head to the dump to throw away their rubbish; Bluey and Bingo play pretend zoo.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Birthday Heros for Hero / Maple Cheer-Up
programme.desc: The pups must fix Hero's new birthday toy after Rolly and Keia accidentally break it. The Pugs head to Canada to save Bob's pancake surprise for Bonnie!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: No Bones About It/ Bob's Sock Debacle
programme.desc: When Bonnie’s dinosaur bone is lost, the pups team up with a roadrunner to find it. The pups set out to look for Bob's favorite golf socks before he participates in a tournament.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Go-long Retriever/ Pot O' Pugs
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to get away from a self-fetching stick that begins chasing them. Then, when Bob says he needs a pot of gold, the pups search for one at the end of a rainbow.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Way of the Woofy/ Werejalinos
programme.desc: When the Wolfies steal a local dog, the PJ Masks must try to get it back! The PJ Masks team up with Night Ninja to stop the Wolfies from destroying Mystery Mountain.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Master of the Moat/PJ Robot Vs Romeo
programme.desc: Romeo captures a special crystal and becomes Master of the Sky. PJ Robot and Romeo must work together when the Flying Factory is damaged.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Phantom of the Café / Cuckoo in Paris
programme.desc: During Chef Pierre's café opening, Goofy's famous Goofy Dogs are stolen! When the Happy Helpers return to Paris, Cuckoo Loca discovers new family members!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Ski Trippin'!/ My Fair Pete
programme.desc: On a winter ski trip with her friends, Daisy remembers that she doesn't know how to ski! Pete is worried that he won't be able to impress his Mama when she comes for a visit.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Leave It to Beavers/ Counting Sheep
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to build a dam to protect their doghouse from a rainstorm. When Bob says he'll 'count sheep' to sleep, the pugs herd a flock of sheep into the backyard to help.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A Seat at the Theatre/ Bye Bye Butterfly
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly help a butterfly get home to its family in Mexico. The pugs push Bob's office chair to a theater to see his favorite play.

programme.title: PJ Masks: The Prank Wheelz/ Where's the Wolfie Wheelz?
programme.desc: The Wolfies turn their Wolf Wheelz into Prank Wheelz. Luna Girl and Motsuki are controlling the Wolf Wheelz to wreak havoc causing the Wolfies and the PJ Masks to work together.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Moon Madness
programme.desc: Luna Girl steals the moon crystal to power up her Luna Fortress’ Mega-Magnet, which creates a portal that pulls stuff up from the city. The PJ Masks go off to the moon to stop her!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Birthday Heros for Hero / Maple Cheer-Up
programme.desc: The pups must fix Hero's new birthday toy after Rolly and Keia accidentally break it. The Pugs head to Canada to save Bob's pancake surprise for Bonnie!

programme.desc: When Bonnie’s dinosaur bone is lost, the pups team up with a roadrunner to find it. The pups set out to look for Bob's favorite golf socks before he participates in a tournament.
