programme.desc: Mickey and pals help Minnie's friend, Buzzby the Bee, find her way back home after a strong wind blows her away from her sunflower in Mickey Park.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Super Wish
programme.desc: Goofy wishes he could be a super-hero so that he can help out his friends.

programme.title: Bluey: The Weekend / BBQ / Fruitbat
programme.desc: Bluey and her family play a game in the garden; Bingo searches for ingredients for a salad; Bluey dreams about a fruit bat.

programme.title: Bluey: Pirates / Chickenrat /Neighbours
programme.desc: Bluey, Bingo and Missy pretend to be pirates; Bingo loses her favourite toy right before bedtime; Bluey builds a new pretend house.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: You Quack Me Up / Tree House Trouble
programme.desc: Donald decides to win the pranking contest for April Fool's Day. When Chip and Dale have a roommate squabble, they ask the Happy Helpers to find them each a new home.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Cuckoo for Cuckoo Clocks!
programme.desc: Minnie and Daisy try to find a replacement cuckoo clock for Cuckoo Loca.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy's Magical Mix-up
programme.desc: Goofy the Great accidentally causes Pluto's doghouse to magically disappear.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Daisy's Grasshopper
programme.desc: Mickey and pals help Daisy find her new friend, Wilbur the Grasshopper.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie's Mouseke-Calendar
programme.desc: When the wind blows way all the pages of Minnie's daily calendar, Mickey and pals help her put it back together again and keep all of her plans up to date.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie's Pajama Party
programme.desc: Minnie's Clubhouse pajama party turns into a camp out under the stars in order to accommodate last minute guest Willie the Giant.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie and Daisy's Flower Shower
programme.desc: With the help of Professor Von Drake's special Pitter Patter Glitter, Minnie and Daisy turn normal clouds into rain clouds so they can water their flower gardens in time for the big flower show.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald of the Desert
programme.desc: Mickey and his friends travel to the faraway Desert to get sand for the Clubhouse Sandbox.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: The Go-Getters
programme.desc: Detective Minnie, Secret Spy Daisy and Captain Clarabelle band together to form the Go-Getters in order to help stop a group of giant baby chicks who are running loose in Mickey Park.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Happy Birthday, Toodles
programme.desc: Everybody wants to give Toodles a surprise birthday party -- but there's a problem. They'll need Mouseketools to prepare for the party.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Daredevil Goofy!/ The Big Broadcast
programme.desc: Goofy gets a chance to compete against a movie hero in a daredevil competition. Then, the happy helpers cover for Billy Beagle as race announcers while he competes.

programme.desc: When a mysterious rash of blue spots breaks out among some of the toys in the clinic, Doc traces the 'mystery pox' back to Donny's toy monster, Glo-Bo, who had been finger-painting earlier in the day.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Mickey's Ukulele Jam / Grandpa vs. Grandpa
programme.desc: While participating in a Ukulele Jam, Donald loses Mickey's special ukulele. The Happy Helpers are judges for a Hawaiian surfing contest and learn about a lifelong rivalry!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Pit Stop and Go!/ Alarm on the Farm!
programme.desc: It's the first 'Pit Stop and Go Rally' where pit crews compete against each other. The Happy Helpers look after Clara Cluck's farm while she's out of town.

programme.desc: Mickey challenges Professor Von Drake's Self-Racing Racer to a race and Billy Beagle asks the Happy Helpers to help his grandpa with some errands.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Goof Quest/ Llama Drama

programme.title: Bluey: Fairies/ Work/ Bumpy and the Wise Old Wolfhound
programme.desc: Bluey thinks there are Fairies in the backyard; Bluey and Bingo are hired by Dad at the drainpipe factory; Dad and Bluey send Bingo a video.

programme.desc: When a trip to the Empire State Building is cancelled, Bob signs up for a game show; The pugs want to bring the Empire State Building to Bob.

programme.desc: After Hissy gets a 'time out' for the day, Bingo and Rolly try to break her out of her punishment. To change Bob's fortune, the pugs travel to Ireland to bring home some good luck.

programme.desc: Freddy and Pip try their hardest to keep a baby tiger prince clean; Freddy tries to find the perfect birthday present for one of the new babies.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Cheetah Chase / Training Daze
programme.desc: When a cheetah is accidentally set loose, Pip and Freddy must play a game of tag to catch it; Pip and Freddy find themselves leading a group of storks on a class trip.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Goofasaur!/ Teahouse Helpers
programme.desc: A tour of Tokyo goes sideways when Goofy accidentally unleashes a robot dinosaur upon the city! Minnie takes her friends to experience a traditional Japanese tea ceremony.

programme.desc: Mickey and his pals finish building Mickey's brand new house! Millie and Melody have a birthday sleepover at Minnie and Daisy's vacation house!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Legend of Ol' Snapper/Adventures in Puppy-Sitting
programme.desc: After Bob loses his favourite fishing pole, Bingo and Rolly must confront a legendary creature to get it back. The pugs look after a puppy who turns out to be a BIG handful.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Free Whaley/ Putting It Together
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly help a baby whale that has been separated from her family. Later, the pugs retrace their steps to remember where they buried Bob's unicycle.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: A Light for the Lighthouse / Music City Mishap
programme.desc: When the pugs find out that the light on Bob's favourite lighthouse isn't working, they go on a mission to fix it. Then, While in Nashville, Bingo and Rolly find a lost guitar and go on a mission to return it to its rightful owner.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Master of the Moat/PJ Robot Vs Romeo
programme.desc: Romeo captures a special crystal and becomes Master of the Sky. PJ Robot and Romeo must work together when the Flying Factory is damaged.

programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly try to get away from a self-fetching stick that begins chasing them. Then, when Bob says he needs a pot of gold, the pups search for one at the end of a rainbow.

programme.title: Bluey: Pirates / Chickenrat /Neighbours
programme.desc: Bluey, Bingo and Missy pretend to be pirates; Bingo loses her favourite toy right before bedtime; Bluey builds a new pretend house.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: The Karate Cub/Don't Over Duet
programme.desc: Fozzie must learn some 'Camilla-rate' in order to join the martial arts team, The Kickin' Chickens. Piggy practices her performance for Miss Nanny too hard and loses her voice!

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Back to School/ Bromance
programme.desc: When Dave discovers he didn't graduate from high school, he finds himself in school with Alvin. Simon has found a new best friend, Jamie. But when Jamie realizes that Alvin is the more popular brother, he ditches Simon.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: School Alone/ It Came From Outer Space
programme.desc: Alvin and Brittany get stuck at school with a ghost that roams the halls; Alvin gets some unwanted attention when he claims to have found a meteor.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Sister Act/ Lil' T
programme.desc: Following a fight with Brittany, Eleanor decides to move in with Alvin and his brothers. When his brothers won't listen to Theodore's song, he posts a video of himself rapping on the Internet and it becomes a mega-hit.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Kiss Conspiracy/ House Guest
programme.desc: Simon is too embarrassed to kiss his co-star in the school play. So in a moment of desperation, he agrees to allow Alvin to switch identities with him. Alvin secretly decides to rent out their house for a Hawaiian home-swap.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Sooper Poof/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: Poof is trying to shapeshift, but he unfortunately takes after Cosmo!

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: The Bored Identity/ Country Clubbed
programme.desc: Dad is depressed because everyone thinks he is boring. Timmy wishes Dad's life was more like an action movie. Timmy and his parents get invited to a country club. Cosmo feuds with a gopher. Timmy wishes to be a socialite.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Old Man and the C-/ Balance of Flour
programme.desc: Dad admits he dropped out of school in grade 5 and joins Timmy's class.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: The Past and the Furious
programme.desc: Cosmo and Wanda take Timmy on a trip back in time to meet some of their past Godkids. But things take a turn for the worst when Timmy interacts with the past and alters the future.

programme.title: The Loud House: Out of the Picture/ Room With a Feud
programme.desc: Afraid they'll be forgotten, Lincoln and Clyde want to make a splash in the yearbook and crash group photos. Seeing his sisters fight with their roommates, Lincoln suggests a room shuffle based on a compatibility test.

programme.title: The Loud House: ARGGH! You For Real?/ Garage Banned
programme.desc: Lincoln and Clyde find out that ARGGH! is coming to town and decide to go to the taping. Tired of her siblings, Lori moves to the garage, but quickly finds it's more than she bargained for.

programme.title: Ollie's Pack: Lord of the Caf/ Doom for Rent
programme.desc: After recess gets cancelled, Ollie directs Lucius Van Horn to play VP Magna and change up the rules. In hopes of making some extra cash for a Mother's Day gift, Ollie rents his shed to bounty hunters.

programme.title: Young Dylan: Plain Faces
programme.desc: Dylan doesn't want to attend school, and does whatever it takes to avoid going, including convincing little Charlie not to go, either.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Good Neighbors/ Skill Crane
programme.desc: Squidward obsesses over winning a stuffed animal; Squid's security system backfires.

programme.desc: SpongeBob tries to spend time with his friends but he ends up being a nuisance to everyone instead. They all tell him to go away, so with a heavy heart, he does just that.

programme.title: It's Pony: Distractions/ The Giving Chair

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: The Pest of the West

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: A Flea in Her Dome/ Donut of Shame
programme.desc: Sandy must get rid of her Tree Dome of fleas; Patrick feels bad about taking a donut.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Naughty Nautical Neighbors/ Boating School

programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.desc: Dipper's secret journal pages lead him and the gang to the author's hidden bunker where they find themselves face-to-face with a mysterious figure from Gravity Falls' lore.

programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.desc: After Anne helps Sprig break up with Maddie, strange things start happening to them. When a popular talent competition comes to Wartwood, Hop Pop goes overboard in training Sprig to win.

programme.title: Amphibia: The Big Bugball Game/ Combat Camp
programme.desc: Anne must learn the value of teamwork to win the town’s annual Bugball game.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Irrational Treasure
programme.desc: When Dipper and Mabel discover evidence that the reported town founder is a hoax, they set out to expose the historical coverup and prove Mabel's silliness is not a bad thing.

programme.title: Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Memories in the Mist!
programme.desc: A visit to Hapu’s farm envelops our heroes in an experience they will never forget!

programme.title: Marvel's Spider-Man: Maximum Venom: Web of Venom

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Bottomless Pit!
programme.desc: When Stan, Dipper, Mabel and Soos find themselves falling into a bottomless pit, they each decide to tell a different story to pass the time.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Lost Harp of Mervana!
programme.desc: The family joins a zen mermaid society to find a missing mystery, but Louie is convinced the seemingly innocent mermaids have a villainous agenda of their own.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Night Bill/ Cheap Snake
programme.desc: When Bill sneaks out at night with a mysterious duffel bag in tow, the kids hide in his truck to see where he goes. Cricket impulsively decides to buy a giant pet snake.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Elevator Action / Bad Influencer
programme.desc: Gloria gets stuck on an elevator with the Greens. Remy falls under the sway of an internet influencer.

programme.title: Amphibia: Sprig vs. Hop Pop / Girl Time
programme.desc: A fearless teen is magically transported to a rural marshland full of frog people.

programme.title: The Owl House: Lost in Language
programme.desc: Luz's pranks at the library lead to unintended consequences.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Headhunters
programme.desc: When someone tampers with Mabel's life-size wax statue, she and Dipper set out to find the culprit. Meanwhile, Grunkle Stan mourns over the loss of his wax doppelganger.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Crush, Chop and Burn
programme.desc: Leo discovers three teenage super-humans, Adam, Bree and Chase, living in a secret underground lab in his high-tech home. Leo takes the trio to school, but when they are unable to contain their bionic abilities, they are sent away and Leo must save them.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Crush, Chop and Burn
programme.desc: Leo discovers three teenage super-humans, Adam, Bree and Chase, living in a secret underground lab in his high-tech home. Leo takes the trio to school, but when they are unable to contain their bionic abilities, they are sent away and Leo must save them.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Commando APP
programme.desc: On the Lab Rats' first day of school, all goes awry when Chase is confronted by a football player and his 'Commando App' is triggered, transforming him into an unruly drill sergeant.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Chip Switch
programme.desc: Adam, Bree and Chase defy warnings from Davenport and swap bionic chips with bad results.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Night of the Living Virus
programme.desc: Leo accidentally releases a virus that transforms Eddy into a virtual demon.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Death Spiral Smackdown
programme.desc: Leo teams up with Adam in a school fitness challenge, hoping that Adam's bionic powers will be his secret weapon. But the plan backfires when they end up going head-to-head in the finals.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Chore Wars
programme.desc: Adam, Bree and Chase learn about chores and earn an allowance for the first time, then decide to host a yard sale to raise more money.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Back From the Future
programme.desc: Leo, from seven years in the future, arrives in present day to prevent Adam, Bree and Chase from going on a mission from which they won't return.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Bionic Birthday Fail
programme.desc: Adam, Bree, and Chase, who have never had a birthday party of their own, get so caught up in throwing a surprise party for Leo that they forget to invite him to it.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Drone Alone
programme.desc: When Tasha and Davenport go on a vacation, Leo must make sure that nothing happens to his stepdad's prized possessions.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Concert in a Can
programme.desc: The Lab Rats befriend a new kid in school named Marcus, who takes to the whole gang very quickly, except for Leo.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Mission: Space
programme.desc: While Adam, Bree and Chase head off for their latest mission, Leo is tasked with distracting his nemesis Marcus. When Marcus wanders into the lab, Davenport is forced to cover and answer his prying question.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Adam Up
programme.desc: In an effort to get out of training duties, Adam enlists Leo's help to create a duplicate Adam using Davenport's experimental cloning device.

programme.title: Lab Rats: Trucked Out
programme.desc: Adam closes a deal for a monster truck and sets out to stash it in the school parking lot.

programme.title: Fons & Porter's Love of Quilting: Cut Glass Echoes
programme.desc: The heirloom quilt block Cut Glass Dish is used to make a quilt called Cut Glass Echoes. Learn techniques for making triangle squares, echoing triangle square units, and reducing lumpy seams.

programme.title: Garden Smart
programme.desc: Horticultural experts from across the United States share their knowledge and gardening experience.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban
programme.desc: Harry learns that a murderer has escaped Azkaban prison and is believed to be after him.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Goblet of Fire

programme.title: Modern Family: The Closet Case

programme.title: Modern Family: She Crazy

programme.title: Modern Family: The More You Ignore Me

programme.title: NCIS: Los Angeles: Allegiance
programme.desc: While in Afghanistan, Kensi and Granger join the team on a joint case when a federal agent in Los Angeles tied to Hawala, an ancient system of money transfer, is murdered.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Built to Kill

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: Built to Kill

programme.title: Movie: Stepmom
programme.desc: A woman teaches both herself and her children to accept her ex-husband's new girlfriend.

programme.title: Movie: Nanny Seduction
programme.desc: A couple's child goes missing soon after they hire a new nanny. The husband quickly realizes the nanny's true identity and knows a secret from his past now threatens to destroy his marriage and family forever.

programme.title: Movie: Bad Tutor
programme.desc: A single mother is focused on getting her daughter off to college. She hires her a tutor to help with her grades, but soon, the tutor becomes obsessed with his student.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pinned by the Evidence
programme.desc: A street fight takes the life of a wrestler. A jury believes the accused killed in cold blood. He gets sentenced to twenty years in prison. Six years later, he is granted another trial when a forensic animator offers a different explanation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cries Unheard
programme.desc: When a 19-year-old girl is first found dead in her car, it seems to be an apparent suicide. Unsatisfied investigators probe the case further and discover the girl was involved in a complicated love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: A former trouble-maker sits on Ohio death row for killing an elderly couple, while a desperate team of journalists, attorneys, and former law enforcement make the case of his innocence.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Tale of the Tape
programme.desc: After a Delaware store clerk is murdered, a local drug dealer confesses to the crime, but there is doubt that what he said on tape can be believed.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Love Kills
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Stacey Stites' body is found half-naked by the side of the road, her fiancé, police officer Jimmy Fennell, is cleared as a suspect.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Feds vs. Outlaws
programme.desc: The leader of the notorious Outlaws biker club is accused of a quadruple homicide in Fort Lauderdale. He beats the rap for the murders but is sentenced to death for the car bombing of a federal witness in New Orleans.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: When an elderly couple die in a housefire their son becomes the prime suspect. The son insists that he is innocent, and that his efforts to extinguish the fire made it worse. Investigators turn to science to determine the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crash Course
programme.desc: A highway patrolman is shocked by a coroner's ruling of an 'accidental death.' after he attends a Crash scene with far more blood than usual. An anonymous tip reinvigorates the investigation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg Up on Crime
programme.desc: The case of a decomposed body found in an irrigation canal goes unsolved until shoe prints left by the careless criminal while dumping the body of his second victim give authorities the evidence they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sleight of Hand
programme.desc: Investigators search for an assailant who has avoided the law for sixteen years.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Scratching the Surface
programme.desc: Forensic scientists must find a way to "lift" the serial number from a 12-gauge shotgun.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dessert Served Cold
programme.desc: When a Massachusetts man dropped dead of an apparent heart attack, no one thought foul play was a possibility until police looked into his girlfriend’s odd behavior in the days before his death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Music Case
programme.desc: The sense of security in Waseca, Minnesota shatters when 12-year-old Cally Jo Larson is found dead in her home.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Silk Stalkings
programme.desc: The news of a flight attendant's brutal murder prompts a man to contact police with details of another similar case. After considering the evidence, police determine they are dealing with a serial killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fishing for the Truth
programme.desc: A rescued deckhand tells the story of how he tried desperately to free his captain when his foot got caught as their small boat was sinking in a storm. He's quickly hailed a hero. But when the captain's body is found, a different story is told.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Soiled Plan
programme.desc: Police instituted an intense search after a mother of two young children went missing. Days later they found her body. Then the case went cold for twenty years, until advances in technology allowed the investigators to see the case in a new light.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Headquarters
programme.desc: Hunters stumble upon a scene that includes a skull and small bones, bits of clothing, a woman's shoe, and a strand of hair. Police determine a woman was stabbed to death, and reconstruct an image of her face to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: For Love or Money
programme.desc: A wealthy man goes missing, and leaves behind instructions in his will regarding what should be done if he died of violent circumstances, leading to believe he was aware his life was in danger.

programme.title: Forensic Files: South of the Border
programme.desc: The murder of an American tourist in Mexico seems to be burglary related. However, closer examination by law officials both sides of the border reveal a far more sinister truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Palm Print Conviction
programme.desc: A woman leaves a bar with a stranger only to have her body discovered the next morning.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Vow of Silence
programme.desc: When a man's friends report his mail-order bride missing, police soon orient their investigation around the husband. While following up on some leads, they dig up some evidence tying him to deaths of two other wives.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: The Lost Boy
programme.desc: A former trouble-maker sits on Ohio death row for killing an elderly couple, while a desperate team of journalists, attorneys, and former law enforcement make the case of his innocence.

programme.desc: A 19-year-old Pennsylvania woman disappears on her way to work leaving behind her infant son, a family who loves her, and a job she enjoys. Police investigators view this case as a missing person/ possible homicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Naked Justice
programme.desc: The 29-year-old, pregnant wife of a young, successful attorney is found dead in her Michigan home of a gunshot wound to the head. Blood spatter analysis and a painstaking investigation led police to the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Plastic Puzzle
programme.desc: When a bicycle rider is struck and fatally injured in a hit-and-run accident, forensic investigators utilize an assortment of miniscule clues to determine the identity of the offending vehicle and eventually the person who was driving it.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Up in Smoke
programme.desc: When an elderly couple die in a housefire their son becomes the prime suspect. The son insists that he is innocent, and that his efforts to extinguish the fire made it worse. Investigators turn to science to determine the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherhoods
programme.desc: Police suspect white supremacists when a gay couple is killed in their bed. Shell casings, some chips of paint and shards of glass help link their suspects to a string of hate crimes across the state of California.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair of the Dog
programme.desc: With no forensic evidence found at a murder scene, investigators were baffled. But they suspected that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: One for the Road
programme.desc: After a married couple decided to escape the cold of winter with a vacation in Key West, the wife went missing and police searched the island without finding any evidence. Then two important pieces of video surfaced.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Army of Evidence
programme.desc: A mother of two children is found dead near suicide notes and a pistol. At first it is assumed to be a suicide, but when police learn she had nearly been killed in a fire three years earlier, new suspicions are raised.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Honey Pot

programme.title: Gold Rush: Parker's Trail: Mine, Moment, Machine
programme.desc: With insider facts and bonus scenes: Parker gambles on dry-mining equipment but a case of gold fever proves costly, nearly costing him a team member.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Blasting Gold
programme.desc: Tyler leads Parker to a promising hard rock mine where they detonate high explosives to gauge if the rewards of underground mining justify the risks. Dave Turin taps into the skills and wisdom of old-timers to help make him a more successful miner.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Kilcher Quarantine
programme.desc: As the coronavirus spreads into Alaska and ATLF camera crews are sent home for safety, the Kilcher family self-documents the quarantine and how the COVID-19 crisis is changing life on the homestead.

programme.title: Aussie Gold Hunters: Heartbreak and Ambition
programme.desc: The Dirt Dogs hit a possible jackpot while the Gold Gypsies' season begins with heartbreak. Ted and Lecky Mahoney hit the gold trail.

programme.desc: Top Professional Anglers challenge Scott and Brian to a bass challenge on the St. Lawrence River.

programme.desc: The team prepares for their next auction, which includes 19th century ladies muff pistols and two antique books, one signed by John Hancock.

programme.desc: In Greenbrier County, Nick and Brian explore Cold War secrets, birds of prey, and a river trail.

programme.title: Uncharted Waters with Peter Miller: Biscayne Bay inshore Grand Slam. Bonefish, Permit, Tarpon
programme.desc: In Miami, Carl Ball guides Peter to target bonefish, permit and tarpon.

programme.title: The RVers: Choosing a Towable/ Power gadgets
programme.desc: Learn about towables, RV batteries, and RV gear.

programme.title: Chasin' the Sun: Wake Fish

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: The Harris Legacy
programme.desc: The discovery of mysterious fishing charts on the Cornelia Maria leads co-captains Josh Harris and Casey McManus to Hawaii to learn what Josh's late father, Captain Phil Harris, was attempting to accomplish decades ago.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Bloodline: Proving Grounds
programme.desc: Josh, Casey and Jeff travel to the southern edge of Kona's fishing grounds a spot Phil Harris frequently explored. Despite the rough waters and unpredictable weather, the trio dives into Kona's shark-infested waters to learn what kept Phil coming back.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Code to Gold
programme.desc: Josh scours Virginia backcountry in search of the legendary Thomas Beale Treasure, worth millions today. With encrypted codes hiding its whereabouts, Josh takes a detour to Philadelphia to uncover missing pieces to the puzzle.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Origins of Stonehenge
programme.desc: Josh travels to his ancestral home of Great Britain to explore the origins of Stonehenge. From high in the air to deep under the sea, he finds an unexpected network of monuments that could have inspired one of history's most mystical locations.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Quest for King Arthur
programme.desc: Josh scours England, Wales, and Scotland to find the real life King Arthur.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: Lost Gold of Scotland
programme.desc: John joins treasure hunters in the Scottish Highlands chasing a lead on a lost cache of gold that was hidden after the Jacobite Uprising of 1745 and never recovered.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: The Lost Tomb of Attila the Hun
programme.desc: Josh travels to Hungary to join three separate archeological teams looking for the lost tomb of Attila the Hun. Legends and ancient texts lead the search from the bottom of the Danube to the mountain forests just outside of Budapest.

programme.title: Expedition Unknown: India's Atlantis
programme.desc: Josh Gates travels to India in search of Dwarka, a mythical kingdom swallowed by the ocean. To find evidence that the golden city is real, Josh dives into the Arabian Sea and visits a dig site that could rewrite history.

programme.desc: ABC News bride Linsey searches to find her perfect wedding gown, but everything her entourage chooses fails to live up to her own expectations. Bride Tessie wants to be a princess on her wedding day.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Giraffe
programme.desc: Amber brings the islands to the mainland at her Hawaiian-themed reception, while Shelly incorporates her Afghan heritage.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Love Potion
programme.desc: Ashley heats up the dance floor at her nightclub venue, while Samantha goes wild with animals. Arlene keeps things traditional, while Jen's reception bubbles with science and fairy tales.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Hearse
programme.desc: Natasha leaves her groom in tears with a tender serenade, while Leigh hires a jolly Santa to serve up sliders and fries with a smile. Jamie brings old world romance to life with pearls and lace, while Jasmin's party includes toe tags, coffins and skulls.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Love Hike
programme.desc: Chelsea is al bride who believes in traditional weddings; Emily's wedding will be all romance tying the knot on a stately mansion.

programme.title: Zombie House Flipping: The Waterlogged Cabin
programme.desc: A 'lurker' Zombie seems great initially, but has a lot of water damage under the surface. The team must battle against continuous rainfall in order to ensure their upgrades don't get washed away, which means a major revamp of the roof.

programme.title: Live PD: Wanted
programme.desc: Audience members help law enforcement agencies across the country track down fugitives.

programme.title: Live PD: Wanted
programme.desc: Audience members help law enforcement agencies across the country track down fugitives.

programme.title: Live PD
programme.desc: Unfettered and unfiltered live access inside the country's busiest police forces and the communities they patrol. Host Dan Abrams and police detectives give insight to what audiences are seeing in real time.

programme.title: It's Personal With Amy Hoggart: Grief
programme.desc: Amy Hoggart goes to absurd lengths to untangle people's life issues like shame and grief.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes and discover who considered taking a quick thumbs down. Plus, find out what type of vacation Murr prefers, and how many attempts it took to film the punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Butterfly Crime Scene
programme.desc: Find out what classic phrase was uttered in this early episode that is still said today, and what unaired challenges almost made it to the show. Plus, the real backstory of Butterfly Crime Scene.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: All the Wrong Moves
programme.desc: What prop does Murr carry almost daily? Which Jokers danced in their high school musical?

programme.title: Tacoma FD: I'm Eddie Penisi...Sr.
programme.desc: When Fire Commissioner Eddie Penisi, Sr. shows up at the station, Eddie and Terry vie for his approval. Meanwhile, the rest of the team plays Dungeons & Dragons to win the acceptance of their dungeon master.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Talkoma: I'm Eddie Penisi...Sr.
programme.desc: Kevin Heffernan and Steve Lemme take viewers behind the scenes of Tacoma FD.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Take Me Out at the Ballgame
programme.desc: Find out how Murr chose which guys to honk at Volcano Bay, what happened to the TP used in the stock boy shootout, and how Joe stayed safe after messing with NY Mets fans at Citi Field.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Just Say No
programme.desc: Find out which joker loves blackjack, what baseball team two of the guys split season tickets for and how they found the lovely lady whose heart Q broke during his ball field punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Find out which jokers were in on the surprise Gary Busey appearance, where the phrase 'tit for tat' came from, and how Murr's big mouth backfired on him, leading to this Statue of Liberty punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Make Womb for Daddy
programme.desc: Find out who scored free sandwiches while shooting at Blimpie; what classic game inspired the 'Guess What' challenge; and what was worse for Q than the pain he endured during his 'childbirth' punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Ruffled Feathers
programme.desc: The guys conduct focus groups to sell their illogical inventions created by the other guys, then head to a shoe store where they get off on the wrong foot. Plus, tonight's big loser discovers he’s more flight than fight at the zoo.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Stripped of Dignity
programme.desc: The guys get a taste of babysitting while asking reluctant strangers to watch their kid, then head to the grocery store to conduct taste(less) tests with shoppers, and tonight's loser is forced to strip for the wrong people.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Pseudo-Sumo
programme.desc: The Jokers that are big pro wrestling fans, and how long it took Joe to recover from his Sumo punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Toasted
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Sal and Q get in a pickle serving up humiliating tasks as deli waiters, and later, they step behind the counter asking customers to settle a series of silly debates. Plus, tonight's big loser gets burned during an embarrassing toast.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Find out which Joker only drinks coffee after 2pm; who is most self-conscious about singing; and how long did Joe and Q wait inside while Murr and Sal hung out on a ski lift in the freezing cold.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: A Hot Mess
programme.desc: Fiery identical twins take on saucy drag queens in the Pepperdome. It's duke it out or puke it out in this episode where one player becomes very intimate with the Hot Ones' spit bucket.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: No Sugar, Tons of Spice
programme.desc: Two teams duke it out against the catastrophic concoctions from Chef Willie.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Parent Trap
programme.desc: The guys get stuck in a grocery post-it showdown, and tonight's big loser earns a time-out for his outrageous behavior at a kids' play space.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Catastrophe
programme.desc: The guys serve up the goods at a juice bar, and tonight's loser confronts his biggest fear in a punishment that leaves him practically catatonic.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Hitting the Wrong Note
programme.desc: The guys dress to the nines, but act like zeroes while trying to get sympathy, and tonight's big loser faces the music in a tone-deaf punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Wrong Playwright
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Murr, and Q hit the supermarket to mess with shoppers in an epic game of hide-and-sneak. Then, the guys draw straws at a BBQ joint, and tonight's loser gets a bad case of stage fright while giving the performance of his life.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins America
programme.desc: Adam lets his freedom flag fly by examining why America doesn’t have higher rates of social mobility. He then uncovers the flaws within the constitution and examines the country’s progression and regression.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Games
programme.desc: Adam hits pause on the myth that connects video games to real-life violence, and reveals that Monopoly was a rip-off of an anti-capitalist teaching game. Plus, Olympic organizers get rich while athletes struggle to get by.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Sitcom
programme.desc: Adam tackles classic television stereotypes, from the racism behind public pools, to the 'model minority' myth of Asian Americans, to the on-screen toxic masculinity that's masking the problems young men face today.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Plate of Nachos
programme.desc: Adam dishes out the facts on the avocado trade being ruled by drug cartels, and big pork making bacon a pop culture hit while covering up its huge health risks. Plus, America's food problems stem from corn.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Hack My Lawn
programme.desc: Kevin and Brooke bring back a failed lawnmower hack to see if it will work. Plus, Kevin tests cheese cutting hacks for your next charcuterie and hack 911 takes on a murder mystery.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Mother Hacker
programme.desc: Brooke and Kevin test out a new toilet hack that will have you seeing in the dark, and Brooke has tips for hacking your dating profile. Plus, it's the shock of the season when Señor Solución finally meets his match, his mother-in-law.

programme.title: Hack My Life
programme.desc: Brooke and Kevin hack a cellphone to the limit with a hot glue gun. Then, they test user-submitted hacks to see which one will bring flowers back from the dead. Finally, Kevin and Brooke tests an unexpected leaf blower hack.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Inside Hacks: Cookin' Up Some Hacks
programme.desc: Brooke and Kevin take hacking to the next level as they uncover the best hacks for cooking pizza and cutting cake. Plus, they’ll show you why bread is a true all-star, and teach some hacks that every parent needs to know.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Inside Hacks: Pool Party of One
programme.desc: The pitchman saves you a trip to the spa with a facial hack that you can find in any schoolkid's book bag.

programme.title: Hack My Life: Inside Hacks
programme.desc: Find out what country gives huge fines for chewing gum, how long you can survive without water in a zombie apocalypse, and which one of our hacks was the most expensive to make.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: Performers 13
programme.desc: Counting down 20 of the dumbest performers you've ever seen including a woman dancing in butter and team mascots gone wild.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Performers 16
programme.desc: Twenty of the most pinheaded performers ever to take the stage. From lion trainers under attack, to a sexy drum solo, and a guy famous for smoking weed.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Performers 17
programme.desc: From an underwear clad girl giving a sobriety test, to amateur fireworks technicians, plus a funeral home Christmas greeting, these dumb performers shine in the roles they were both to play.

programme.title: Movie: Wild Wild West
programme.desc: Two government agents are brought together by the President to track down an evil genius.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Lipstick and the Flying Nun
programme.desc: While working at an antique shop, Michael unpacks an item with a message from beyond. Plus, he works a fundraiser where a painting raises not only money but the body of a nun.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Moving Dragon
programme.desc: While working at a pool store, Michael flies on a kickboard. Then, at a pet store, he breeds hamsters from pellets. He also stuns his helper on moving day with a fiery statue.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Chilly Flakes and Wormholes
programme.desc: Michael works in a spice shop and gets an icy treatment with his take on 'chilly flakes'. Plus, he cleans a spill at a hotel with his phone. Afterwards, at an abandoned house, he amazes his assistant by climbing through a wormhole.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Cat Lady
programme.desc: At auditions, Michael wows directors with costume changes but cracks when he sings. Plus, things get sticky when he demos flying post-its. Then, Michael's co-worker's jaw drops when a shape-shifting tenant returns while they clean house.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Walking Dread
programme.desc: The guys take time to smell the roses, then pair up to double dip at the mall. Tonight's loser battles an undead enemy to save his family.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Kraut to Couscous
programme.desc: Guy looks for some global flavour favourites in small joints all across America.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Global Comfort
programme.desc: Guy travels to find feel good food including mofongo, one Guy's all time favourites.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Seafood and Sammies
programme.desc: A food truck shuckin' and frying oysters for a po boy in Vancouver.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Scratch Made Classics
programme.desc: This trip, some of Guy's favourites are totally homemade from coast to coast. In Manhattan, N.Y., a real deal chef is crankin' out homemade pretzels with a special beer cheese sauce.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Keepin' It Real
programme.desc: In Miami, Florida, the Asian fusion spot delivers the bomb dot com brussels sprouts, and goes all out ducky on the sous vide sammie.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Cross Country Comfort Food
programme.desc: Guy is finding great food from the ski slopes to the sea. In Miami, a law student who has traded in his suit for a chef coat is making all kinds of comfort food, from spicy ox tail to big ragu.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Seafood and Savory
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's grabbing some off-the-hook seafood and savory sensations in Miami, Fla.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sandwich Showcase
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's on the road to grab some serious sandwiches. In Austin, a rock-n-roll brunch bar adding a funky touch to meatloaf and a Monte Cristo. Plus, a Texas joint putting some '90s hip hop into their stacked-up specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Flavortown Comes Home
programme.desc: With restaurant takeout and delivery taking over the nation, on this trip, Guy is hosting a virtual Triple-D family reunion, bringing 'Flavortown' to his own kitchen. Guy checks in with four DDD alumns who walk Guy through their signature recipes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Savory with a Side of Sweet
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is jumping into some sweet and savory dishes. In Burlington, Vt., a vegan joint gettin' crazy with a crunch wrap and coconut-banana French toast.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Big Burgers To Little Italy
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's going from the bomb burgers to a taste of Italy. In Little Rock, Ark., a funky joint pairing their craft brews with all kinds of on-the-bun creations.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Ocean Coasts and Great Lakes
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's going from coast to coast and to the Great Lakes to dig up some dynamite dishes. In Los Angeles, a Mexican joint in Grand Central Market serves outrageous octopus tostadas and puts a lights-out spin on a burger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Kinds of Comfort
programme.desc: This trip, Guy dives into all kinds of comfort cooking. In Phoenix a funky joint stacks up barbecue fries and a new spin on chilaquiles. In Boulder a pizza place loads up the pies with their meatball grinder.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: College-Town Champs
programme.desc: Guy visits Columbus, Ohio for pierogies and a barbeque truck and Boulder, Colorado for noodles and chicken from a Thai restaurant.

programme.title: 30 Minute Meals: Spaghetti With Bacon and Chard

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Everything Retro Is New Again
programme.desc: Valerie and Tom love to reminisce about old times, but like all long-term relationships and old-school recipes, there comes a time to give them a little update!

programme.title: The Kitchen: Diner Favorites
programme.desc: We're serving up our favourite dinner recipes with a side of fries, Sunny Anderson's disco fries that is. Jeff Mauro makes a classic patty melt and shares his secret for creamy coleslaw, and Geoffrey Zakarian whips up perfect lemon meringue pie.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Food Tour: Midwest Edition
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood takes a trip down memory lane, recreating her favorite dishes from her time on tour in the Midwest and sharing memories using her own photos and footage.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: The Big Till
programme.desc: Molly Yeh is making an easy and hearty lunch for the Hagen family farmers, and she's using some of her favorite pantry staples- with a twist.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Staying Home 2
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is home on the ranch and sharing great ideas for quarantine cooking. Her daughters Paige and Alex, nephew Stuart and her friends Mauricio step in as the crew shoot the show on their phones. Ree raids the pantry to make tomato soup 2.0.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Quick and Easy: Ranch Cookout
programme.desc: Ree Drummond puts together a quick and easy ranch-style cookout. She makes super-fast Caribbean Burgers with Mango Slaw for a taste of the islands in Oklahoma, and her Sunshine Pasta Salad and Lemon Mustard Dressing is a colorful side dish.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Quarantine Edition: A Full Day of Delicious
programme.desc: The Kitchen is getting a full day of meals on the table with easy recipes for breakfast, lunch, dinner and even dessert. Geoffrey Zakarian kicks things off with his daughters as his sous chefs make huevos rancheros.

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Day at the Races

programme.title: Trisha's Southern Kitchen: Grillin' and Chillin'
programme.desc: Trisha Yearwood's nephew is coming in for a visit and is ready to chow down on a home-cooked barbecue meal. They have a great time catching up and chilling out with an old-fashioned menu that includes bacon BBQ nachos.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout: Some Like It Spicy
programme.desc: Alex kicks of the season with four chefs staking out customers at Fry's Marketplace in Phoenix. One chef must go after cooking breakfast to go, and the parking lot heats up something spicy. The judges decide who has the guiltiest pleasure.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout: Sixty-Dollar Butter
programme.desc: Four chefs roll the dice on something sandwiched at Smith's in Las Vegas, Nev. The parking lot goes overseas to Italy before going all in on an indulgent dessert, and one chef's shopper hits the jackpot when they get more than they bargained for.

programme.title: Supermarket Stakeout: Toast the Competition
programme.desc: It's a great day for grocery shoppers at Ralph's in Glendale, Calif., as four chefs pay big for those bags. First there's a burrito battle, and then it's a stakeout that'll make Grandma proud. It all comes down to the last chefs standing, and one's toast.

programme.desc: Captains and crew share their perspectives on their deadliest moments at sea. Winter crab season is here and with it this year's biggest storm. Every captain must choose to risk all heading out into the storm or stay back, tied to dock losing money.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Roughest and Toughest: Crab Trap
programme.desc: On the Northwestern Jake gets a whiplash-style captaining lesson from Sig. A long trip and a prank threaten Captain Johnathan's catch on the Time Bandit.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Roughest and Toughest: Cull
programme.desc: Captain Sig and crew fight for their lives against an engine room fire 250 miles from land. Faulty hydraulics and a flying 800-pound pot make for a deadly situation on the Saga.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Roughest and Toughest: Ring Net

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Roughest and Toughest: Trotline

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Ultimate Backyard Paradises

programme.desc: Aaron's father, Don, calls Zak and the crew to his Las Vegas home to investigate threatening paranormal activity. The terrifying apparition of a little girl and a dark, powerful presence a neighbor believes is a witch has left Don scared for his life.

programme.title: Ghost Adventures: Industrial District of the Damned
programme.desc: Zak and the crew investigate a 120-year-old building in Salt Lake City's industrial district. Local business owners claim paranormal activity has recently ramped up after a break-in revealed remnants of a dark ritual in the basement.

programme.title: Ghost Nation: The Witching Tree
programme.desc: Jason, Steve, Dave and Shari answer a distressed couple's call for help in Biglerville, Pennsylvania. The newlyweds believe a cursed 'witching tree' in the yard is behind the apparitions and unexplained noises haunting their 19th-century farmhouse.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Moving On
programme.desc: In an effort to cheer up Grayson, Savannah organizes a farewell weekend for Grayson and friends. Meanwhile, Chase teams up with BFF Parker for an unexpected get-rich-quick scheme.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Too Close for Comfort
programme.desc: As the Chrisley's settle into their new Nashville home, Todd begins to encroach upon Savannah's independence. Meanwhile, Grayson takes up wrestling and challenges Chase to a match.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Smoothie Operator
programme.desc: The family prepares for the Grand Opening of their newly purchased juice bar, but Chase can't take the job seriously. Back at the house, Faye tries to collect on a bet she made with Grayson.

programme.title: Chrisley Knows Best: Chase in Charge
programme.desc: Todd and Julie head to LA for Julie's liposuction procedure, leaving Chase in charge. But when Chase abuses his newfound authority, Todd must return home early to put a stop to Chase's antics.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset: Country Fried Persians
programme.desc: Destiney surprises Sara's brother Sam for his birthday, but has questions after seeing a completely different side to him. Nema prepares for his event while Erica finally leaves his company. The entire crew gears up for his event, and a surprise meeting.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset: Behind the Episode: Le’ing with the Devil
programme.desc: Mike surprises Paulina with a birthday trip to Hawaii, and invites the whole crew along. Paulina plans a night out with the girls before the trip, while Nema and Mike prepare by getting Botox. Tensions boil over among the Shahs at an unforgettable Lu'au.

programme.title: Shahs of Sunset: The Persian Shore
programme.desc: The Shahs are on a trip to Hawaii to celebrate Paulina's 29th birthday. MJ makes an off-color remark and causes a stir with Mike and Paulina. Nema and GG find themselves having too much to drink, heightening the lingering tension between them.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Entrée-Vous
programme.desc: The crew must provide a romantic trip for new guests celebrating their seven-month dating anniversary. Bobby gets the green light to go after Julia, while Tiffany and Bryan get cozy in the hot tub. Meanwhile, Ben takes Hannah on a date.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Who's Got Game?
programme.desc: Hannah experiences the ultimate betrayal when Ben goes to the Captain about their galley miscommunication. After back-to-back charters, the Ionian Princess Crew finally enjoy a day off until Bryan decides to give Danny a lesson in dickie etiquette.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Charter King
programme.desc: Hannah’s migraine explodes when the bachelor charter guests bring back a large group of girls on board. Upon their exit, the bachelors anoint Danny as the charter MVP, much to the chagrin of Bobby and Bryan.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Fever Pitch
programme.desc: Hannah and Ben redefine their relationship while Bobby realizes he can't shut off his feelings for Julia after a flirty night with Hannah. After the crew pulls off a beach BBQ without a hitch, Ben is tasked with making American S'mores in Greece.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: Charter From Heaven, Charter From Hell?
programme.desc: While Danny is away at the hospital, the crew revels in his absence. When Bryan confronts Jen on her ability to tie knots, she finally stands up to him. Meanwhile, Tiffany's feelings for Ben increase, while Bobby continues to be sidelined by Julia.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: They Hate Us Cuz They Ain't Us
programme.desc: The demanding charter guests extend their stay, and Hannah puts on her best stew face to regain their trust. Julia and Ben have a class war after a miscommunication. Meanwhile, the Captain gives Danny his phone back, putting Bryan on high alert.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: The Beautiful Thing About Subpar
programme.desc: As the guests finally prepare to leave the yacht after their extended stay, Hannah hopes her charm wins them over with a generous tip. Meanwhile, Captain Mark is left with a big decision that will shake up the dynamic of the entire crew.

programme.title: Below Deck: Mediterranean: That Was Very Greek of Us
programme.desc: A celebratory night out turns ugly and a hungover Bobby must make his apology rounds. For the final charter, an all-male group brings their own set of demands and an exhausted crew must struggle to keep up. Plus, the girls band together to confront Bryan.

programme.title: Lost Gold of World War II: Death on the Mountain
programme.desc: A team of Americans attempts to solve one of the great mysteries of World War II. With the help of an eyewitness, they explore a mountain in the Philippines where Japanese general Yamashita is believed to have buried a vast treasure during the war.

programme.title: Lost Gold of World War II: X Marks the Spot
programme.desc: Excavation is put on hold when the team unearths a possible water trap. The team conducts a LiDAR scan to find another way into the mountain.

programme.title: Lost Gold of World War II: Dead Giveaway
programme.desc: The team uncover a potential booby trap, and their first hint of treasure in a cave that may have been a headquarters for General Yamashita during the war.

programme.title: Lost Gold of World War II: What Lies Beneath
programme.desc: The team triggers a possible water trap in the cave and is forced to stop digging. Martin believes the story rock indicates a tunnel behind a waterfall and the team brings in a Navy diver to explore the plunge pools and search for an entrance.

programme.title: Lost Gold of World War II: The Backdoor
programme.desc: Unable to find a tunnel at the waterfall, the team is guided by an animal marker to a boulder carved in the shape of a turtle. Following the direction of the turtle head, the team discovers a golden lily symbol indicating a secret backdoor entrance.

programme.title: Lost Gold of World War II: Nazi Concrete
programme.desc: The team believes there's a secret backdoor entrance to the mountain behind a unique formation of rocks. After battling a typhoon and possible Nazi concrete, they find a void 40-foot below.

programme.title: Lost Gold of World War II: Blood and Conspiracy
programme.desc: Bingo uncovers a possible link to a CIA conspiracy when the team zeroes in on a tunnel that may be part of a treasure labyrinth, and learn that part of Ferdinand Marcos' fortune may have been stolen from Yamashita's Treasure.

programme.title: Lost Gold of World War II: Tunnel Found

programme.title: Jessie: The Blind Date, the Cheapskate and the Primate

programme.title: Bunk'd: Cramped Champions

programme.title: Public Affairs Events

programme.title: Catching a Serial Killer: Sam Little
programme.desc: Investigative journalist Beth Karas follows Sam Little, America's most prolific serial killer who confessed to murdering over 90 women in 17 states, in hopes to identify how he got away with murder for so long.

programme.title: Deadly Cults: Killers of Rulo
programme.desc: After hearing about a religious cult stockpiling weapons on an isolated farm outside Rulo, Nebraska, FBI agents cultivate an informant from inside the group who details the torture and murder being ordered by the group's diabolical leader.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: 12 Minutes on Elm Street
programme.desc: Cousins Nick Brady and Haile Kifer were best friends. To their family, they seemed like typical teenagers. Turns out, the cousins had a secret that led to tragedy. The story divided a small town and sparked a national debate.

programme.title: Snapped: Alaina Mercer
programme.desc: Devoted to raising her daughter's child, a loving grandmother is found executed in her own home. Police unfold an ongoing custody battle which leads to suspicions towards those nearest to her grandchild.

programme.title: Snapped: Tameshia Shelton
programme.desc: A young man ends up dead while out hunting.

programme.title: Snapped: Valerie Pape
programme.desc: An Arizona socialite makes a gruesome discovery which leads local law enforcement to ask questions about her troubled marriage. She claims she found a man dead, but police have reason to believe otherwise.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: 12 Minutes on Elm Street
programme.desc: Cousins Nick Brady and Haile Kifer were best friends. To their family, they seemed like typical teenagers. Turns out, the cousins had a secret that led to tragedy. The story divided a small town and sparked a national debate.

programme.title: Deadly Cults: Killers of Rulo
programme.desc: After hearing about a religious cult stockpiling weapons on an isolated farm outside Rulo, Nebraska, FBI agents cultivate an informant from inside the group who details the torture and murder being ordered by the group's diabolical leader.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Small Town Secrets
programme.desc: Kelly and Steve Spingola head to Wisconsin to investigate an unsolved homicide. The case becomes personal after they receive a letter from the victim’s daughters. Their search uncovers a town’s dark side, crimes against children and lies within a church.

programme.title: Snapped: Social Media
programme.desc: Three women are driven to extremes, all with one thing in common, social media.

programme.title: Snapped: Marissa Devault
programme.desc: A brutal attack with a hammer leads to claims of abuse and reveals a shocking secret life.

programme.title: Snapped: Ana Trujillo
programme.desc: A prominent scientist is bludgeoned to death with a blue stiletto heel.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Betrayal Of Trust
programme.desc: Deede Keller had a loving family, a tight circle of friends and a new man in her life. When she vanished, disturbing clues would point investigators to a suspect with a dark secret. The case provided a twist that left the courtroom astonished.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Mystery at Ascot Estates
programme.desc: It was Friday the 13th and something sinister was about to happen: a chilling double murder in an upscale home. The evidence seemed to tell a clear story. Then investigators discovered a marriage filled with secrets and a story that didn't add up.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Mother Daughter Tragedy
programme.desc: In 1993, a 29-year-old mother and her six-year-old daughter were found strangled to death in their home. Former prosecutor Kelly Siegler and former crime-scene investigator Yolanda McClary investigate seeking the person responsible.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Digging for Answers
programme.desc: Kelly and Steve head to Oregon to help solve the 1993 murder of a young man allegedly shot and buried by a group of dangerous criminals. They'll need to pit them against each other to crack the case and finally bring justice to his family.

programme.title: Cold Justice: Deadly Affairs
programme.desc: Kelly and Steve investigate the 2016 homicide of a hard-working mother who was strangled to death and dumped in a ditch. Was it a random act of violence, or did her strained marriage factor in to her murder?

programme.title: Dying to Belong: Antoinetta McKoy
programme.desc: When a young woman's longing for love and family leads her down a dark path, she ends up in the hands of a murderous cult leader.

programme.title: Snapped: Killer Couples: Sara Aldrete & Adolfo Constanzo
programme.desc: In the Mexican desert, two cult leaders’ passion for torture and human sacrifice is exposed when they pick the wrong victim.

programme.title: Snapped: Beatrice Camper
programme.desc: A popular cab-driver is shot dead on the job, but the search for his killer reveals his wife's secret prison visits, a torrid affair and a possible conspiracy.

programme.title: Snapped: Sandy Locklear
programme.desc: The murder of a beloved widower leaves police wondering what secrets his marriage, to his much younger new wife, might be hiding.

programme.title: Snapped: Michelle Paet
programme.desc: An Air Force sergeant is gunned down in his garage revealing an elaborate conspiracy with an unlikely mastermind.

programme.title: Snapped: Laura Stelmasek
programme.desc: Police must unravel a mystery involving an Arizona couple, cross-country romance and a deadly plan.

programme.title: Movie: Hacksaw Ridge
programme.desc: Army medic Desmond Doss, despite believing that WWII is justified, refuses to carry a weapon into battle. After almost going to prison, he proves himself, evacuating wounded from the front lines. He risks his life to save as many soldiers as he can.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Man in Blue Flannel Pants
programme.desc: The Simpsons host a tastemaker party at their home to promote Absolut Krusty, Krusty the Clown's own brand of liquor. Mr. Burns takes notice of the party's success and decides to promote Homer to 'Account Man' for the Springfield Nuclear Plant.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Ten-Per-Cent Solution
programme.desc: Krusty the Clown gets stuck in a rut when the television network pulls his show and his talent agency drops him. When the Simpsons introduce him to an agent, they're surprised to learn she was Krusty's first-ever agent.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Holidays of Future Passed
programme.desc: The Simpsons flash forward 30 years and find themselves in a tech-savvy, futuristic Springfield. Bart and Lisa have children of their own and decide to spend the holidays as one big family at Homer and Marge's house.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Politically Inept With Homer Simpson

programme.title: The Simpsons: The D'oh-cial Network

programme.title: The Simpsons: Moe Goes From Rags to Riches

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Daughter Also Rises
programme.desc: Marge and Lisa's mother-daughter Valentine's Day plans change when Lisa meets an intellectual romantic who shares her passion for culture, history and literature.

programme.title: The Simpsons: At Long Last Leave

programme.title: The Simpsons: Exit Through the Kwik-E-Mart

programme.title: The Simpsons: How I Wet Your Mother

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Long Time Listener, First Time Bob

programme.title: Bob's Burgers: Lorenzo's Oil? No, Linda's
programme.desc: Linda's new friend introduces her to essential oils and Aunt Gayle is convinced she must be rescued. Meanwhile, Bob and Teddy are bamboozled into performing a series of annoying favours for Mr. Huggins.

programme.title: Family Guy: Dog Bites Bear

programme.title: Family Guy: Send in Stewie, Please

programme.desc: Army medic Desmond Doss, despite believing that WWII is justified, refuses to carry a weapon into battle. After almost going to prison, he proves himself, evacuating wounded from the front lines. He risks his life to save as many soldiers as he can.

programme.title: Star Trek: The Next Generation: Cause and Effect
programme.desc: The Enterprise becomes trapped in a time loop, endlessly repeating the same steps.

programme.desc: A fellowship created to destroy an ancient ring of power is fractured. Part of the group continues the journey to Mount Doom to destroy the ring, while the remainder joins forces with an Elvin army to help defend a keep against an evil army's onslaught.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Ricky Gervais, Sir Patrick Stewart, Thandie Newton and Christine and the Queens visit.

programme.title: Movie: The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers
programme.desc: A fellowship created to destroy an ancient ring of power is fractured. Part of the group continues the journey to Mount Doom to destroy the ring, while the remainder joins forces with an Elvin army to help defend a keep against an evil army's onslaught.

programme.title: Movie: Thinner
programme.desc: An overweight lawyer accidentally kills a woman while driving. He gets away with it and is cursed by a gypsy woman on his way out of the courthouse. He starts to lose weight at a frightening rate and tries to find a way to stop the curse.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Amazon
programme.desc: Steven Backshall investigates what make the Amazon so diverse. He looks at the nutrient poor nature of the rainforest and discusses the strategies used by the life in the jungle to make the most of the little nutrients available.

programme.title: Great Bear Stakeout
programme.desc: Our cameras follow a first-time grizzly mum named Parsnip, and her cub Pushki.

programme.title: Great Bear Stakeout
programme.desc: Alaska's famous salmon run arrives, and Parsnip and Puski return to feed, but face fierce competition.

programme.title: Wild West: Desert Heartlands
programme.desc: Travel from the cold deserts of Nevada to the giant cactus-studded lands of Arizona and the scorching Mojave Desert in California. Discover how some of America's most iconic animals like mustangs and coyotes have learned to survive.

programme.title: Wild West: The High Country
programme.desc: America's High Country is the last of grizzly bears and giant trees, of frigid winters and scorching summers, of tough ranchers and gold-rush fever. From the Rockies to the Sierra Nevada, survival in this land of extreme seasons demands endurance.

programme.title: Wild West: Restless Shores
programme.desc: Tectonic forces shape all life here, creating stunning landscapes like the San Andreas Fault, reaching north to the Pacific coast. Elephant seals battle it out for mates and grey whales form a unique friendship with a small community of people.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: Revealing the riches and wonders of the Polar Regions that keep people coming for years. Its survival relies on a combination of ancient wisdom and cutting edge science.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: An Epic Journey
programme.desc: The very best highlights of the series, taking viewers on a spectacular journey through the entire polar year, from the depths of winter to the melting world of the polar summer.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: To the Ends of the Earth
programme.desc: The polar regions experience the planet's most extreme seasons and are home to some of its most surprising animal behaviours. Polar bears search and fight for mates, penguins surf and orcas hunt collaboratively.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Spring
programme.desc: Spring arrives in the poles and the sun appears after many months of darkness, as do the adelie penguins. In the Antarctic, the sun seems welcoming but its return triggers fierce katabatic winds.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Summer
programme.desc: The summertime is a time when the harshest environments on Earth temporarily become favourable for most. While the sun never sets, life speeds up for polar wildlife in a race to raise their young.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Autumn
programme.desc: For the animals of the Polar Regions, time is running out in the autumn. The Arctic Ocean freezes over and the sea ice advances around Antarctica.

programme.title: Lockup: Charleston Extended Stay: Dirt Roads and Trouble
programme.desc: A young woman finds love in the jail's one co-ed housing unit. Another inmate, charged with a spree of armed robberies, now comes under investigation inside the jail.

programme.title: Lockup: New Jersey Extended Stay: God Is Not Here
programme.desc: An inmate has pled guilty to manslaughter, but now in an unusual legal twist, he may have to stand trial for murder. And a convicted murderer stands trial for a gruesome related crime.

programme.title: Lockup: Orange County Jail Extended Stay: Highs and Lows
programme.desc: A select group of deputies at the Orange County Jail have their hands full with a sadistic murderer who transforms the jail, a roller derby queen who takes a hard fall, and one inmate who realizes that even a good day in jail can have a dark side.

programme.title: Lockup: Boston Extended Stay: Baptism by Fire
programme.desc: Inside Suffolk County Jail, one inmate finds himself on the wrong end of a vicious attack. Another, with a reputation for violence, keeps the staff on constant alert.

programme.title: Lockup: Cincinnati Extended Stay: Dead Run
programme.desc: A heroin addict must choose between the lifestyle she craves and the young son she has left behind. Another seasoned female inmate is transferred back to the jail from state prison, but she suddenly finds herself on the wrong end of a fist.

programme.desc: An inmate says a bet for two cups of soup led to a horrific slashing; a case of road rage results in a murder charge for a software engineer, and now, after two years in jail, a jury will decide if he must go to prison for life.

programme.title: Lockup: New Jersey Extended Stay: No Remorse
programme.desc: A threat against an officer leads to a major shakedown. And an alleged gang leader becomes a magnet for trouble. Also, a high-speed chase ends with the discovery of a 21- year-old murder victim and now the jail must deal with her cold-blooded killer.

programme.title: Lockup: New Jersey Extended Stay: Thicker Than a Bowl of Oatmeal

programme.desc: An inmate causes chaos in his housing unit after accusing staff of abusing him, and he explodes in anger when a valued possession is taken from his cell.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: She Loves Me Not
programme.desc: When Special Forces Major David Shannon is fatally shot in his family home, investigators wonder if his job made him a target. But a deeper inspection of his personal life reveals sordid secrets... possibly leading to his murder.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Gambling With Death
programme.desc: Ernest and Charlene Scherer are found beaten and stabbed to death in their exclusive Northern California community. It appears to be a robbery gone wrong, until investigators hone in on the motive.

programme.title: Married With Secrets: Missing in Alaska
programme.desc: Mike Dixiano is heartbroken when his wife Angela Dixiano dies from organ failure after a lifelong battle with drugs and alcohol. Friends and family grieve her death, but when investigators can't find a death certificate, her husband comes under scrutiny.

programme.title: Who Killed Laci Peterson?
programme.desc: Bill Kurtis looks at the circumstances surrounding the death of 27-year-old Laci Peterson.

programme.title: The Mafia Kingpin
programme.desc: Arnold Rothstein schooled the founders of the American Mafia in the ways of organized crime during the 1920s and the the model for running crime business.

programme.title: Bugsy Siegel: Godfather of Vegas
programme.desc: Bugsy Siegel, the Jewish gangster with charm and a killer's instinct, plays hard and dreams big. He's got a vision to build a gambling mecca in the Nevada desert; but when he stops playing by the Mafia's rules, Bugsy pays the ultimate price.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape with a Battleaxe
programme.desc: Russell Kerr is serving a 60 year sentence for a crime he says he didn't commit. He and a fellow inmate, Christopher Stout, mastermind an elaborate escape. After busting through the prison gates, they risk life and limb for their one shot of freedom.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Escape in Underwear
programme.desc: Ricky McCurry has been in and out of prison his whole life, escaping by tricking and bribing guards. On the outside, McCurry runs into bad luck with botched robberies and high-speed chases.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: GOT to Pretend to Be a Cop
programme.desc: Peter Gibbs is a career criminal who is constantly lured to the dark side after every prison release, despite vowing to go straight. After a string of robberies catches up to him, he faces decades behind bars but refuses to go down without a fight.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Run With My Buddy
programme.desc: Larry McClendon, while in prison for murder, escapes with seven others. Larry is forced to be creative in his evasion of the cops; hiding in abandoned shacks, and muddy pigpens, and even dressing as a woman as a disguise.

programme.title: I (Almost) Got Away With It: Got to Be Bonnie and Clyde
programme.desc: After getting arrested for robbery, Robert Askew runs from a work camp and goes back to stealing to make a living. Askew eventually gets caught again, but he escapes from jail during a hurricane and goes on a crime spree, breaking into vacation homes.
