programme.title: First Time Flippers: Another Brick in the Flip
programme.desc: A couple decides to flip an old farmhouse in North Carolina, but the two soon realize they may have taken on more than they can handle. They worry if they don't bust their budget and hire professional help, the flip will never end.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Funhouse Flip
programme.desc: Two friends think they have hit the jackpot when they nab a large house in Westport, CT as their first flip. They soon realize, however, that the house has more quirks than they expected and the seemingly simple flip turns into a nightmare.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Unscrewed Flip
programme.desc: A real estate agent takes on a flip with her mom in Bossier City, Louisiana. These novices are in over their heads from the start as basic tools cause a struggle and attempted projects go awry.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Plagued by Perfectionism
programme.desc: A woman wants to support her husband's dream of flipping a house in Parma, OH, but she quickly realizes his perfectionism will result in a slower flip than anticipated. As each project becomes more complicated, she feels stuck in a never-ending flip.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Shock and Awe
programme.desc: Despite their lack of knowledge, a married couple takes on an enormous house in Rohnert Park, CA, for their first flip. His reckless approach might be worse than their inexperience, leaving her worried it could cost them in the end.

programme.title: First Time Flippers: Funniest Flippers
programme.desc: From non-stop questions to incorrect use of tools, flippers find themselves in some seriously funny situations. They experience trials, tribulations and hilarious moments during their renovations.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Tennessee Dream Pool
programme.desc: The Yarbrough family, Franklin Tennessee locals, call upon the experts at Peek Pools and Spas to build their dream pool.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Mountain Paradise
programme.desc: The Kings take on their most spectacular project to date when a young family asks them to build the perfect pool for their dream home overlooking the mountains outside Ogden, Utah. They want the works including a 50 ft. long, 12 ft. deep pool.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Stay the Course
programme.desc: The Pool Kings head to Austin, Texas to build a pool alongside a golf course. The guys have their work cut out for them as they work to create a feature-filled pool that works in all seasons, provides privacy from golfers and matches the new patio.

programme.title: Pool Kings: The Pirate Treasure Pool
programme.desc: Kelly Caviness and his team build two spectacular pools. The first is a modern, kid-friendly retreat for Mike, Lisa and their 2 children. The other pool is an epic pirate-themed water park complete with a hidden treasure room and animatronic pirates.

programme.title: Pool Kings: From Flawed to Flawless
programme.desc: A Franklin, TN, couple enlists the Pool Kings to build their dream pool in their very challenging backyard.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Hill Country Caribbean
programme.desc: After years of vacationing on the island of Roatan, a couple has decided to just build the Caribbean in their back yard. The team design a curvilinear pool with infinity edge, a sunken bar area, six water figures and a beach like they've ever built.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Three Rivers and a Pool
programme.desc: A couple want an alluring yard that incorporates the beauty of their cliff-side property. The enlarged yard area gets a deck bisected by a faux stream, a feature-filled pool with stone slab bridge, jumping boulders and even a slide.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Caribbean Spa
programme.desc: With three energetic kids and lots of friends, a family needs a pool to keep everyone entertained. They create a masterpiece that includes a huge deck for Dad, a Baja shelf for Mom and multiple water features.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Water, Water Everywhere
programme.desc: An active family in Austin, Texas, wants their own pool so they can spend time together outdoors at home and entertain their friends. Steve and Justin design a beautiful, feature-packed pool with copper scuppers and floating steps.

programme.title: Pool Kings: Champagne Spa Wishes and Forever-home Dreams
programme.desc: Grandparents Joe and Beth want to add a dream pool to their forever home so they can host more family events. They hope the addition of this backyard oasis will complete their dream home and allow them to create many more memories outside.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Nevada Cob House
programme.desc: A group of off-grid-living enthusiasts come together to build a 300-square-foot bungalow in Nevada. With a variety of eco-friendly features, including a solar-powered water pump, this house is a welcome addition to the environmentally friendly community.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Carolina Catamaran
programme.desc: A couple of pro builders construct an upcycled off-grid homestead deep in the sprawling South Carolina islands. Plans for the catamaran-style home include a luxury yacht aesthetic, but the couple must build during hurricane season to meet their deadline.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Annie the Musical

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Candy Critters
programme.desc: Gophers and bunnies and butterflies oh my! Even a vegetarian will want to snack on these creatures. Catch cheerful Albanese gummy butterflies in action and pop in on Savannah Candy Kitchen's chocolate gophers.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Cheese Glorious Cheese
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro proves that no matter how you slice it, cheese just makes everything better. Find out how TGI Fridays' cheddar bacon potato skin appetizer gets turned into a yummy chip and how Mom Made Cheesy Mac tastes.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Colorful Candies
programme.desc: From delightfully twisted Red Vines to the multicolored Mike and Ikes and multi-flavored Jelly Bellies, join us for a Willy Wonka style tour of treats.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Fruits and Veggies
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro wants you to eat your fruits and veggies; pears in your hard cider, carrots in your cookies and sweet potato fries with a satisfying crunch.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Go Nuts
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro and Unwrapped 2.0 go nuts for nuts! Tumbled in sugar, nestled in chocolate, whatever you do with nuts, it's hard to go wrong. Find out how one candy bar did active military duty in WW1.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Rise and Dine
programme.desc: Rise and Dine with Unwrapped 2.0 and find out how the light and airy French donut gets its fancy twist, as well as how sprouted wheat turns into a hearty, tasty cinnamon raisin bagel.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Island Eats
programme.desc: Roger Mooking searches the country for the 12 best island eats from lobster, conch and shellfish to low-country boils and key lime pies.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Super-Sized
programme.desc: Roger Mooking sets out on a culinary odyssey around the country to find the 12 best super-sized dishes. He's hanging out with chefs to learn all their secrets for creating ultimate omelets, steaks, sandwiches, seafood platters and more.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Pigging Out On Pork
programme.desc: One of the great wonders of the barbecue world is smoked pork shoulder. It's a big hunk of meat cooked low and slow until succulent and tender. Roger's favorite way to devour this delicious thing of beauty is in a sandwich.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Alabama BBQ
programme.desc: The American Barbecue Belt in the South stretches from the Carolinas to Texas, and today Roger heads to the heart of it - Alabama. Roger meets award-winning Pit Master Chris Lilly at Big Bob Gibson Bar-B-Q in Decatur.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Low Country Cookouts
programme.desc: Roger's in charming South Carolina for two spectacular low country cookouts: a traditional backyard pig pickin' and a classic oyster roast.

programme.title: Man Fire Food: Lone Star Load-Up
programme.desc: Roger is loading up on the best brisket, pork steaks and sausages the Lone Star state has to offer. Ronnie's BBQ in Johnson City attracts locals and barbecue aficionados.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Double Doggie Dare!/ Empire State of Mind
programme.desc: When a trip to the Empire State Building is cancelled, Bob signs up for a game show; The pugs want to bring the Empire State Building to Bob.

programme.desc: After Bob loses his favourite fishing pole, Bingo and Rolly must confront a legendary creature to get it back. The pugs look after a puppy who turns out to be a BIG handful.

programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly help a baby whale that has been separated from her family. Later, the pugs retrace their steps to remember where they buried Bob's unicycle.

programme.desc: The story of a young boy who needs help and the two magical fairies that come to his aid.

programme.desc: Donnie's newly built Turtle Tank goes missing. In order to get a birthday gift for Splinter, the Turtles have to take on thuggish Times Square Mascots.

programme.desc: The turtles are back and this time they've got awesome powers.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: One Man Banned/ Frenemy Mine
programme.desc: After Timmy's rejected from the school band, he wishes everyone would love his music. Timmy saves Vicky from a horrible accident.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Irrational Treasure
programme.desc: When Dipper and Mabel discover evidence that the reported town founder is a hoax, they set out to expose the historical coverup and prove Mabel's silliness is not a bad thing.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Time Traveler's Pig
programme.desc: When Dipper wishes he could go back in time and undo a mistake he made, he discovers there is a time machine that can help him do just that. Meanwhile, it's love at first sight for Mabel when she wins a pet pig at the fair.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Fight Fighters
programme.desc: After being challenged to a video game battle by Wendy's boyfriend Robbie, Dipper is shocked when his favourite playable fighter, Rumble McSkirmish, comes to life to defend him. Dipper soon loses control over Rumble and has to find a way to stop him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Dipper
programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Summerween
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel are excited to join in on the fun, but when Wendy casually mentions that trick-or-treating is for kids, Dipper's whole outlook on the evening changes. Dipper accidentally insults a monster who makes him fill his candy quota or be eaten.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boss Mabel
programme.desc: When Mabel questions the way Sam runs the Shack, he challenges her to a bet: whoever can make the most money in three days wins the chance to run the Shack however they wish for the rest of the summer.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Bottomless Pit!
programme.desc: When Stan, Dipper, Mabel and Soos find themselves falling into a bottomless pit, they each decide to tell a different story to pass the time.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Carpet Diem
programme.desc: Mabel finds a way to swap minds with Dipper and the townsfolk, so she uses her new found ability to make a difference in people's lives.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Land Before Swine
programme.desc: When a prehistoric beast snatches Mabel’s beloved pig Waddles, the Pines family must journey to a land trapped in time to rescue him.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dreamscaperers
programme.desc: Dipper, Mabel and Soos must travel through Grunkle Stan's mind to defeat a tricky dream demon summoned by Lil Gideon.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Gideon Rises
programme.desc: After Li'l Gideon takes over the Mystery Shack, Dipper and Mabel try to defeat him and win back their home. Unfortunately, Li'l Gideon is always one step ahead. Dipper and Mabel must face the fact that their summer in Gravity Falls is coming to an end.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Scary-oke
programme.desc: Kyle wants to be smart like his younger sister. When The Cortex overhears this, he decides to exploit Kyle's dream. Then, Motho Jr. doesn't want to wreak havoc like the stereotypical movie monster his dad is, he just wants to dance.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Into the Bunker
programme.desc: Dipper's secret journal pages lead him and the gang to the author's hidden bunker where they find themselves face-to-face with a mysterious figure from Gravity Falls' lore.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Golf War
programme.desc: After being belittled by Pacifica one too many times, Mabel challenges her to a miniature golf-off which gets a tad out of control when some local residents offer their help.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Sock Opera
programme.desc: In an attempt to impress a local puppeteer, Mabel decides to put on a huge sock puppet rock opera, but her show goes awry when Dipper’s drive to uncover journal secrets leads to a supernatural disaster.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Soos and the Real Girl
programme.desc: When Soos finds himself in need of a date for his cousin Reggie's engagement party, he looks to a dating simulator game to help him talk to girls.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Little Gift Shop of Horrors
programme.desc: In three separate mysterious tales, Stan is cursed by a witch, Waddles accidentally eats a bowl of brain-enhancing jelly and builds a machine that allows him to speak for the first time and Mabel faces her fear of Claymotion.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Society of the Blind Eye
programme.desc: The kids, along with Old Man McGucket's help, discover there is a secret society on Gravity Falls.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Blendin's Game
programme.desc: Blendin Blandin returns to face off with Dipper and Mabel in a futuristic battle that could trap them forever in time jail.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Love God
programme.desc: Mabel takes matchmaking too far when she steals a love potion from a real Love God.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Northwest Mansion Mystery
programme.desc: Pacifica asks Dipper to bust a poltergeist haunting the Northwest Mansion, before he wreaks havoc on her fancy party.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Not What He Seems
programme.desc: Government agents take Stan into custody, making Dipper and Mabel question how much they really know about their Grunkle Stan.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dungeons, Dungeons and More Dungeons
programme.desc: Dipper finds an unlikely friend to join him with his newest obsession, a board game called 'Dungeons, Dungeons & More Dungeons.'

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Stanchurian Candidate
programme.desc: When Grunkle Stan decides to run for mayor, Dipper and Mabel have their work cut out for them trying to turn their gaffe-prone uncle into the perfect candidate.

programme.title: Ultimate Homes: Tiny Houses
programme.desc: Building a tiny home might seem easy, but as these six homeowners found out, downsizing can be a huge challenge. For those dedicated enough to let go of all their excess, living in a tiny home can have the biggest rewards.

programme.title: Ultimate Homes: Southern Exposure
programme.desc: The swamps and wetland creeks scattered across the south are homes to some of the most unique properties in the country. Meet six unforgettable homeowners who couldn't imagine living in their dream home without a backyard bayou.

programme.title: Ultimate Homes: Mountains
programme.desc: Mountains: for generations, adventurers have always been drawn by their grandeur and their power. Meet six homeowners who had enough inspiration and drive to build their dream homes in such difficult and remote locations.

programme.title: Ultimate Homes: Floating Houses
programme.desc: There's a reason most folks build their homes on solid ground. Building and living on water requires extreme engineering, long patience and deep pockets. If you can make your house float, you'll spend every day anchored in heaven.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Redemption Road
programme.desc: AK, a past survivalist, returns for her chance at redemption. Her partner Jason joins her in tackling the jungle of Guyana, but the two have different priorities. Starvation sets in causing tension to rise. They'll have to come together to survive.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Thieves in the Night
programme.desc: One survivalist falls into a roaring fire after weeks of depleted energy due to no food. With just days to go, the pair makes a daring plan to survive.

programme.title: Naked and Afraid: Hangry
programme.desc: Former Marine Tim and stonemason Shannon take on armies of stinging red ants and bubbling mud volcanoes on the Caribbean island of Trinidad. Even with this daunting location working against them, their biggest struggle is actually each other.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Y'All Are Trying to Please 11 Women
programme.desc: Kentucky grooms Justin and Bryant want their bridesmaids in completely different dresses, but what they think is a sophisticated wedding vision, looks more like a hot mess.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Eleganza Dahling

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: Twelve Years in the Making

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Atlanta: The Perfect Shade of Blue

programme.title: My Big Fat American Gypsy Wedding: So I Married My Ex-Babysitter ...
programme.desc: When a young gypsy man marries his ex-babysitter, the couple adds fire to a family feud that dates back to over 30 years. Later, a progressive gypsy woman defies her traditional Romanichal mom by marrying a gorger.

programme.desc: An ambitious movie producer risks everything and takes a crew to a mysterious island, where they discover and capture a giant ape.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Party Crasher
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr dodge shakedowns with the help of some strangers, and tonight's loser has a run-in at a party that leaves him down for the count.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dover and Out
programme.desc: The guys survey employees with odd questions, and tonight's loser unveils a mural in a small town whose residents react with big city rage.

programme.title: Hot Ones: The Game Show: Suck, Slap or Sauce
programme.desc: A couple faces off against a pair of fishing cousins to see who will take $25,000 home. Once Chef Willie and Sean open their tackle box of hot sauces, even easy questions will become nearly impossible.

programme.title: Hot Ones: Jimmy Butler
programme.desc: NBA star Jimmy Butler battles the wings of death while talking about his shoot-offs with Michael Jordan and his BFF Mark Wahlberg.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Q-Pay
programme.desc: The guys kill time in a waiting room by sharing some TMI texts with strangers, then try to sabotage each other as the wingmen from hell at a dating event. Tonight's big loser gets a very special donation from one of the other Jokers.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Remember the Pact
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q beg shoppers to hold on to a weird item, then teach tech to seniors. Tonight's loser reveals his embarrassing digital life to his dad.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus, tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Putting the P in Pool
programme.desc: Find what Sal finds stressful about posing as a cashier; what's Q's favorite on-set beverage; and when did the crew have to arrive poolside to get a front row seat for Joe's pee punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sneaking Number Twos, Going Number One
programme.desc: Find out why the jokers love filming at the grocery store, how many pencils were purchased for put-pocketing and why Sal's pee punishment was twice as terrible as it looked.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Car Sick
programme.desc: Find out what celebrity Sal wrote fan letters to as a kid, which grocery game is Murr's favourite, how the guys found sloppy Joe and who helped Q's first jeep punishment a milky mess.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sorry for Your Loss
programme.desc: Find out which Joker brought a kitten to the set, and who's responsible for the song used on the show. Plus, learn which instrument Q tried to master before the show.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Lucy Wants a Friend
programme.desc: A crew at a firehouse do everything they can to alleviate their boredom.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Talkoma: Lucy Wants a Friend
programme.desc: Kevin Heffernan and Steve Lemme take viewers behind the scenes of Tacoma FD.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Marathon Man
programme.desc: Find out which joker has pet parakeets, why the crew had to work in a truck down the block while filming at a bagel shop and who got to sound the start horn for Murr's race across the Brooklyn Bridge.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Find out what after-school activity Joe's mom forbid him from doing, why filming nearly halted during the jack asses challenge and what last minute idea made it into Sal and Joe's charity funds punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Turning the Tables
programme.desc: Find out how the Jokers keep their cover while filming at the mall, and Q's favorite VR word. Plus, learn how long Joe was sore after the table-busting punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: No Child Left Behind
programme.desc: Find out how you make a 'Grandpa Whoopsie' doll, why winter is the perfect season to play pin for the win and where the idea for Q's dirty diaper challenge came from.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Go behind the scenes to find out what singer Q is obsessed with, what Sal's secret ingredient to fake vomit is, and why the Jokers in Yonkers had to muffle their laughter.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Sorry for Your Loss

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Ronnie Jordan Headlines
programme.desc: Headliner Ronnie Jordan brings the heat tonight and is joined by funny woman Jade Catta-Preta as she shares the secret to relationship success. Plus, Blaq Ron gets a salsa lesson.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Orlando Leyba Headlines
programme.desc: Orlando Leyba headlines. Plus, Donnell Rawlings tells a story about the time his bike was stolen, and Just Nesh breaks loose in the dressing room.

programme.title: Laff Mobb's Laff Tracks: Michelle Buteau Headlines
programme.desc: Michelle Buteau headlines, while Alex Scott expresses gratitude to the unsung heroes of the work place while Terrence DeLane shares his love for women with experience in the bedroom.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Prison
programme.desc: Adam and Eve shed light on jail rehabilitation, solitary confinement and the fact that corporations make money off of prison inmates.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins the Wild West
programme.desc: Adam illustrates how, despite its macho man reputation, prostitutes actually helped settle the West. He then goes on to explain why the 'All-American Cowboy' is a myth, and that the real hero of the west wasn't a person at all - it was air conditioning.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Justice
programme.desc: After getting Emily out of prison, Adam and his sister Rhea take on the justice system, shining a spotlight on the infamous McDonalds hot coffee lawsuit, and the substantial problems with the jury duty system.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Bro, They're Surrounding Us
programme.desc: Michael reveals an amazing credit card hack, demonstrates how far stem cell research has come, and spooks a gnome-fearing gardener.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: It's a Chicken, Sir
programme.desc: Michael discovers a ferocious new breed of animal at a park, invades a local tea shop, and transforms himself at an abandoned art studio.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Soliciting Statue

programme.desc: Learn the meaning of 'car trouble' in this collection of four wheel fails. Watch a snoozing frat boy get a rude awakening, and find out how a horse snuck its way into a family wedding album.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Lords of the Ring
programme.desc: The guys skirt the law while posing as receptionists, then go fishing at an unlikely locale. And the heat is on tonight's big losers as they try to give one unlucky customer the deal of a lifetime.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Speech Impediment
programme.desc: Joe, Q, Sal and Murr crack each other up from behind glass, then test out awkward proposals. Plus, the big loser gets tongue-tied while speaking to government officials, and later, Joey Fatone goes behind the scenes on after party.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Christmas Chaos
programme.desc: Kris reluctantly allows Kim to take over the annual Christmas Eve Party, but the holiday is in jeopardy when Kris learns Kim has invited an unwelcome guest. Khloe must come to the rescue when North’s beloved hamster unexpectedly dies and Kim can’t deal.

programme.title: In the Room: Kourtney Kardashian
programme.desc: Kourtney Kardashian invites Jason Kennedy over to her house for a raw and real conversation. She talks life in the spotlight, finding a balance as a mom, love, breaking up as well as dishing on her famous siblings.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Treachery
programme.desc: Khloe deals with some debilitating health issues, but her world is turned upside down when rumors surface of Tristan cheating with a close family friend, Jordyn Woods. Kim's husband brings his family and friends together.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Aftershock
programme.desc: After Tristan’s shocking betrayal, Kim and Kourtney take Khloe on a getaway to help her cope with the news. Khloe’s anger reaches a boiling point when she learns that Jordyn is speaking publicly about what happened.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fights, Friendships and Fashion Week Part 1
programme.desc: Kim becomes too friendly with Khloe's ex and Khloe must put her foot down and set some boundaries. Kylie prepares to debut her Kylie Cosmetics collaboration with Balmain at Paris Fashion Week.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Fights, Friendships, and Fashion Week Part 2
programme.desc: In the aftermath of their fight, Kim and Kourtney head to Armenia to baptize their kids. After evaluating her lifestyle, Kourtney considers making a major change. Kris is beside herself when she learns that Kylie is too sick to work in Paris.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Date My Daughter
programme.desc: When Kris is at a sexual peak in her relationship, she feels guilty Khloé is going through a dry spell and tries to push her to date again. Scott panics over an upcoming speaking engagement.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: In the Blink of an Eye
programme.desc: Khloè wrestles with whether to send her daughter to Cleveland to visit Tristan. Kylie considers undergoing a scary medical procedure. Scott and Khloè plan their next prank on Kris that will top all previous pranks.

programme.title: Keeping Up With the Kardashians: Surprise, Surprise
programme.desc: During a whirlwind week of birthdays, Khloe and Kim plan an epic surprise to celebrate Corey. Khloe must choose between freezing her eggs and making embryos with her ex.

programme.title: Movie: Hairspray
programme.desc: A full-figured teen dreams of dancing on a popular dance show, but ends up in detention instead. The feisty young woman later teaches Baltimore a lesson in dance and integration.

programme.title: Movie: She's All That
programme.desc: An athlete bets his friend that he can transform a geeky girl into a beautiful prom queen.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Takeout: Flavortown Comes Home
programme.desc: With restaurant takeout and delivery taking over the nation, on this trip, Guy is hosting a virtual Triple-D family reunion, bringing 'Flavortown' to his own kitchen. Guy checks in with four DDD alumns who walk Guy through their signature recipes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Burgers, Noodles and Quahogs
programme.desc: A Somerville, Mass. burger joint's mac and cheese burger; chorizo-stuffed quahogs.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Coast to Coast Chow
programme.desc: Guy's quest is covering the country. In Charleston, S.C., a breakfast hangout does a chicken-fried biscuit and a shrimp BLT. In Chicago, a 40-year-old institution is busting out traditional German specialties.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Unlikely Partners
programme.desc: Guy checks out some unique combos in Los Angeles and in Toronto.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Chicken, Chili and Chowder
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's hitting the road for some scratch-made comfort food making stops at a family owned chilli restaurant and a three-story gourmet bad food joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Soup-Centric
programme.desc: Guy is filling up on some soup. In Baltimore, the authentic Irish pub is serving seafood gumbo and a twist on traditional corned beef and cabbage.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Sandwiches, Spaetzle and Sticky Wings
programme.desc: Guy's caught up in a whirlwind of flavors when he visits Norfolk, Virginia. A two-for-one spot where a bomb butcher stacks sandwiches by day and a chef firing up ramen and sticky wings takes over at night.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Delicious Discoveries
programme.desc: Guy uncovers surprising culinary discoveries. In Columbus, Ohio, a hidden gem inside a grocery store serves Nepalese-Tibetan specialties. A Mexican spot in Dallas serves seafood tacos and mole fries and another Dallas joint makes dishes from Afghanistan.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Hometown Inspiration
programme.desc: Guy Fieri hits the road to meet chefs putting their roots into their menus. In Logan, Utah, a joint servin' Louisiana specialties like blackened chicken pasta and a marrow butter burger.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Creative Creations
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is divin' into inventive eats. In Burlington, Vt., a funky joint cooking up mac and cheese pancakes. In Richmond, Va., a down-home spot loadin' up their biscuits and going gangbusters with grits.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Smokin' Hot BBQ
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's diving into all kinds of 'cue on this trip. In Ottawa, Canada, a funky chicken joint is cranking the rotisserie and firing up the ribs. In Burlington, Vermont, a place is smokin' their wings and mashin' up their bomb BBQ with righteous ramen.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Regional Recipes
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri's diving into dishes with righteous regional flavour. In San Antonio, an East Coast-Texas deli mashup pilin' up smoked meat sensations, an inspiring Creole spot serving legit gumbo and fried pork chops.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Lights-Out Latin
programme.desc: This trip Guy's into all sorts of amazing Latin specialties from Peru to Panama to elsewhere.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Seriously Saucy
programme.desc: This trip, Guy is topping off some great dishes with all kinds of sauce. In Cincinnati, a cafe puts its own spin on barbecue chicken and vegan chilli.

programme.title: Barefoot Contessa: Back to Basics: Cook Like a Pro: Make-Ahead Breakfast
programme.desc: Ina prepares a breakfast that includes raspberry baked French toast and mini Italian frittatas.

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Pancake House Favorites
programme.desc: Chef Bobby Flay is putting a new spin on classic neighborhood pancake house dishes, like mini Denver omelet frittatas with crispy hammy croutons and silver dollar tropical pancakes with mascarpone whipped cream.

programme.title: Giada Entertains: Family-style Sunday Dinner
programme.desc: In Giada's family, Sundays are set aside for family dinners. For a stress-free, traditional family dinner at home, her menu includes casual but hearty dishes like baby back ribs with spicy peach BBQ sauce and spaghetti with zucchini and squash.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: Amy's in the House!
programme.desc: Valerie prepares inspiring Italian dishes like ribollita, porchetta cantaloupe and radicchio salad.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Fire and Feast
programme.desc: Ree Drummond cooks a spring feast while Ladd and the cowboys are busy on the ranch. She makes perfect pork tenderloin with a delicious herby mustard cream, mac and cheese primavera, and the perfect side, roasted spring veggies and dip.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Celebrating Nan
programme.desc: Ree Drummond and her family are mourning the loss of Ladd's mother so she begins preparing lunch while the family works on tidying the ranch cemetery.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Grilling to Go
programme.desc: Ree Drummond's grilling up a well-deserved tailgate lunch. On the menu are smoky salt and pepper drumsticks, flame-grilled cheesy steakburgers, grilled taters with onions and garlic, spicy street corn and blueberry hand pies.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: Staying Home 2
programme.desc: Ree Drummond is home on the ranch and sharing great ideas for quarantine cooking. Her daughters Paige and Alex, nephew Stuart and her friends Mauricio step in as the crew shoot the show on their phones. Ree raids the pantry to make tomato soup 2.0.

programme.title: Girl Meets Farm: Farm-Style Bowling
programme.desc: Molly Yeh and her husband, Nick, are bringing some bowling party fun to the farm. Nick's building their own lane, and they're inviting friends over to play and enjoy.

programme.title: Valerie's Home Cooking: On The Road Again
programme.desc: Valerie Bertinelli is traveling to Chicago to give a keynote address at a women's expo. To keep her energy up for this quick trip, she's preparing a breakfast parfait with fig compote, fruit and nut trail mix for the plane ride.

programme.title: Delicious Miss Brown: Family Reunion
programme.desc: Kardea Brown's family reunions are big, loud and legendary events. She's hosting the party at her Charleston, S.C., home and makes all the family favorites, including No-Fuss Baby Back Ribs with Carolina Moppin' Sauce and a beautiful 4-Bean Salad.

programme.title: Guy's Ranch Kitchen: Healthy Fusion
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's chef friends visit his ranch to cook, and he challenges them to create healthy dishes instead of the epic, decadent meals they usually make.

programme.title: The Kitchen: Quarantine Edition: A Full Day of Delicious
programme.desc: The Kitchen is getting a full day of meals on the table with easy recipes for breakfast, lunch, dinner and even dessert. Geoffrey Zakarian kicks things off with his daughters as his sous chefs make huevos rancheros.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Deep Fried All-Stars
programme.desc: Deep fried dishes have been all over the map on DDD. You won't want to miss these fried beauties, from classics to off the wall righteousness.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Extra Helpings
programme.desc: This trip, it's an exclusive peek at the lost footage of DDD: the places Guy Fieri's visited before, but all-new dishes never seen until now. Guy's digging in to money mussels, crispy pork skin and a lights-out lamb sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Knockout Burger Joints
programme.desc: Guy's hitting up classic, real-deal burger joints. From California to New Jersey, Minnesota to Oklahoma, it's all about the all-American favorite.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Never Yell Fire in a Crowded Retirement Home

programme.desc: Dorothy must give the eulogy at her brother (a cross dresser), Phil's funeral. Meanwhile, a feud between Sophia and Phil's widow reaches a peak leading Sophia to reveal her hidden feelings about her son's alternative lifestyle.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: The Bloom Is Off the Rose
programme.desc: Rose wants more adventure in her relationship with Miles, so she signs them up for sky diving lessons. Meanwhile, Blanche's relationship with an abusive man causes Dorothy to speak her feelings.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Sister of the Bride

programme.title: The Golden Girls: There Goes the Bride
programme.desc: Dorothy has been sneaking around so that Sophia doesn't discover that she's been dating Stan. However, when Stan proposes, Dorothy must reveal the truth to Sophia.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: Older and Wiser

programme.title: The Zoo: Kangaroo Dave
programme.desc: Dave, a kangaroo suffering from chronic arthritis, tries cryotherapy. A large group of rambunctious gharials are trained to patiently wait for their food. And, a tiny pygmy marmoset gives birth to an even tinier baby.

programme.title: The Zoo: Training Dragons
programme.desc: The squirrel monkeys play hard-to-get with the Children's Zoo's keepers, a pair of Komodo dragons meet for the first time with explosive results and the Inca terns prepare for their first big flight.

programme.title: The Zoo: A New Beginning
programme.desc: Max the camel faces new challenges as he ages. The zoo prepares to give an injured turkey vulture a permanent home, but after healing, there may be a change of plan. Willow the red panda gives birth to two baby cubs.

programme.title: The Zoo: Bronx Tales: Tiger's Day at the Dentist
programme.desc: The staff is hopeful for a successful breeding season when Mshango the giraffe meets the females of the herd. Power tools are needed for an Amur tiger's root canal, while Louie the swan falls ill, jeopardizing his release.

programme.title: The Zoo: Wallaby in the City
programme.desc: A rowdy, young markhor is injured and vets must treat his infected hoof. The TAB staff head to Manhattan to rescue a wallaby living in an apartment, while a fruit bat discovers how to spread her wings, and a trio of alligators move into their summer home.

programme.title: Saved By the Barn: Cockfight Club
programme.desc: Dan heads to Chicago to give cockfighting roosters a second chance. Later, the crew worries if DJ the cow's unruly behavior will be welcomed by the rest of the herd.

programme.title: The Zoo: Covid19 & Animals
programme.desc: Get an update on Nadia, the Bronx Zoo's Malayan tiger who tested positive for COVID-19 from Chief Vet, Dr. Paul Calle. Also, hear from a World Health Organization scientist, wildlife experts and veterinarians on all things COVID-19 and animals.

programme.title: The Zoo: Meet the Babies
programme.desc: A look back at the cutest baby moments from the show. A tiny pygmy marmoset gives birth to an even tinier baby. A Thomson's gazelle needs a helping hand from zoo staff. A newborn snow leopard struggles to walk. A little blue penguin becomes a star.

programme.title: North Woods Law: No Trespassing
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett investigate a possible illegal turkey kill site, while Officer Bronson responds to a call about a snake in a bed. Officer Demler confronts a suspect about shooting a turkey on private property.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Spring Training
programme.desc: Officer Lucas sends a trainee to wrangle his first angry raccoon. Officer Fluette untangles a trapper's web of lies. Officer Benvenuti tries to rescue an injured gosling. Officers Boudreau and Hannett question father and son turkey hunters.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Under the Radar
programme.desc: Officer Canfield breaks up a 45-year-old illegal fishing tournament. Officer MacFadzen rescues an injured hawk. Officer Hannett confronts two kids riding OHRVs on the road. On Mt. Chocorua, officers rescue a woman with a fractured ankle.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Triple Threat
programme.desc: Up north, Sgt. Lucas checks duck hunters. Down south, Officer Benvenuti and Trainee Crouse question a man suspected of hunting over bait. Later, Sgt. Lucas and Officer Holmes attempt to free a cub stuck inside a trap before its mother returns.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Decoy Detail
programme.desc: Officer Egan sets up a decoy and checks hunters at a popular bird hunting site. Officers Towne and Bronson help rescue an injured hiker on Mount Kearsarge. Plus, Lt. Boudreau and Officer MacFadzen investigate a hunting on private property call.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Rules of the Game
programme.desc: Officer Canfield responds to a call about an orphaned bear cub. Sgt. Lucas pays an unexpected visit to a hunter suspected of illegal baiting. And Officer Cyrs investigates a large buck shot by a young, nervous hunter during muzzleloader season.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Dawn Patrol
programme.desc: Pre-dawn on opening day of rifle season, Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett pursue a night hunter. While up north, Officers Canfield and St. Pierre battle the snow to work a deer decoy. And in the city, Officer Frye wrestles an aggressive wild turkey.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Winter Is Coming
programme.desc: Officer Fluette and Moxie attend their graduation. Officer Holmes and trainee McDermott investigate a possible illegal bait site and run a decoy operation with Officer Egan. Sergeant Lucas checks on a moose with odd behavior.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Wild Winter
programme.desc: Officer Bronson questions a hunter who shot a deer without the proper permit, while Officer Demler runs radar on a popular snowmobile trail. Sgt. Lucas investigates a suspicious deer kill site. And Officer Cyrs responds to a snowmobile accident.

programme.title: North Woods Law: In the Thick of It
programme.desc: At the state's largest ice fishing derby, Officer Canfield looks for the owner of a frozen fishing line while Major Juneau takes command of a mountain rescue. Officer McKee runs radar for snowmobiles. And Officer Cyrs checks on a moose in a bog.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Snow Way Out
programme.desc: Officers Bronson and Towne get more than they bargained for with a speeding snowmobiler. The K-9 unit performs winter training. Officer MacFadzen patrols an ice drag racing event. Then, Officer Cyrs heads into the woods to investigate a hit and run.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Pray Anything
programme.desc: Homer is jealous of his neighbour Flanders' good luck and decides to take a leap of faith.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Monkey Suit

programme.title: The Simpsons: Moe Letter Blues
programme.desc: As Mother's Day approaches, Moe narrates an episode in which he writes a letter to Homer, Apu and Reverend Lovejoy, who are vacationing with their children, and threatens to run away with one of their wives.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Pulpit Friction
programme.desc: Homer is recruited to be a church deacon by the trendy new reverend in town. But Bart asks Flanders to help him track down their former pastor, Reverend Lovejoy, when Homer starts to embrace the faith a little too seriously.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Covercraft
programme.desc: Homer has a mid-life crisis, takes up bass guitar and forms a cover band with some of the other dads in town. But the band's modest early success is soon overwhelmed by the breakout potential of their most unlikely star, Apu.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Sky Police

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Nightmare After Krustmas

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Winter
programme.desc: There is no greater challenge for life than winter in the Polar Regions. As temperatures plummet to 70 degrees below zero Fahrenheit, witness the greatest test of survival on the planet.

programme.title: Yellowstone: Winter
programme.desc: Yellowstone freezes solid for six months each year. The severe winter is the greatest challenge facing the Park's animals, but for the wolf, it is the season of opportunity as they stalk ever-weakening prey.

programme.title: Yellowstone: Summer
programme.desc: As summer returns, a new challenge emerges: Yellowstone begins to dry out. Yellowstone cutthroat trout mass in shallow streams ready to spawn, but they make easy prey for otters and osprey.

programme.title: Yellowstone: Autumn
programme.desc: Autumn is Yellowstone's shortest season and a period of swift change. Conditions change from summer to winter in just two months, forcing animals to leave or prepare for winter.

programme.title: Life Story: Power
programme.desc: An individual's life journey interweaves with many others. Those who are successful know when to fight or back down, when to cooperate or to go it alone and how to manipulate and deceive.

programme.title: Yellowstone: Winter

programme.title: Yellowstone: Summer

programme.title: Life Story: Power

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Spring
programme.desc: Spring arrives in the poles and the sun appears after many months of darkness, as do the adelie penguins. In the Antarctic, the sun seems welcoming but its return triggers fierce katabatic winds.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Summer
programme.desc: The summertime is a time when the harshest environments on Earth temporarily become favourable for most. While the sun never sets, life speeds up for polar wildlife in a race to raise their young.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Amazon
programme.desc: Steven Backshall investigates what make the Amazon so diverse. He looks at the nutrient poor nature of the rainforest and discusses the strategies used by the life in the jungle to make the most of the little nutrients available.

programme.title: Hidden Habitats: Okavango

programme.title: Frozen Planet: The Last Frontier
programme.desc: Revealing the riches and wonders of the Polar Regions that keep people coming for years. Its survival relies on a combination of ancient wisdom and cutting edge science.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Autumn
programme.desc: For the animals of the Polar Regions, time is running out in the autumn. The Arctic Ocean freezes over and the sea ice advances around Antarctica.

programme.title: Frozen Planet: Winter

programme.title: Deadly Women: Unspeakable Acts
programme.desc: Greed and lust drove these deadly women to unspeakable acts.

programme.title: Highway to Hell: Hide and Creep
programme.desc: For a mom of three, a trip to the casino is a chance to escape for some fun. But when her journey is cut short and she fails to return home, her family panics and launches a search for her and her vehicle that ultimately reveals a terrible truth.

programme.title: Highway to Hell: The Last Ride
programme.desc: Truck driver Bob Nelson is a week from completing his final cross-country ride before returning to his family and celebrating his 25th wedding anniversary. When he fails to show, cops discover his abandoned truck and a crime scene that raises questions.

programme.title: Highway to Hell: Murder in the Fast Lane
programme.desc: A househunting trip along the Ohio Turnpike in Spring 2005 for Dr. Gulam Moonda and his wife, Donna, ends in disaster when a gunman approaches on the side of the highway.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Knew What He Was
programme.desc: Ronald and Patty had always seen the signs that their older brother, Bernard Eugene Giles, had a darker side. When Gene finally lets loose the monster lurking inside, they couldn't help but wonder how things had gone so wrong.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Evil Undercover
programme.desc: When Lori McLeod fell for a man claiming to be an FBI agent, she felt certain that she would always be safe. Now, as the end of her life draws near, Lori is determined to ensure that the murderer who betrayed her family never becomes a free man.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Nights I Don't Remember
programme.desc: On the mornings when Joylynn Martinez couldn't remember the night before, she always told herself that she must have had too much to drink. She never suspected that her own husband, Robert Howard Bruce, was responsible or that he was just getting started.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Put on a Happy Face
programme.desc: Melissa Moore loved being daddy's little girl, and thought her father, Keith Jesperson, could do no wrong. As she got older, that admiration was replaced by fear, and then by the horror of learning how close she had come to being his next victim.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Invited Him In
programme.desc: Jill Garrison thought her second go-around with love would be the one that lasted the rest of her life. But then her quiet town suddenly began to be preyed upon by a nightmarish killer.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: They Let Him Out
programme.desc: When Clare Bradburn's ex-husband, Ed, suddenly confessed to his crime after 26 years, she thought she finally had justice, but she never expected that her nightmare would continue.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Was His First Victim
programme.desc: Felecia Collier almost killed Chester Turner once. At the time, she was relieved to hear that he would survive. But years later, that moment would become the biggest regret of her life. If only she had just killed him.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: We Looked Happy
programme.desc: Brooke Lehman was raised to believe Kevin Dunlap was her father. Her mother, Stephanie, kept the truth a secret, but neither of them realized that Kevin was keeping other, far more deadly secrets of his own.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Joey Gallo
programme.desc: Crazy Joey Gallo psychopathic killer, beatnik hipster and renegade mobster. Burning with rage and determined to make his way to the top, he wages all-out war against the US gov't and sparks a revolution in the mafia before going down in a hail of bullets.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Downfall
programme.desc: The FBI pursues the five families that run organized crime in New York, and what happens when the fate of the two informers is revealed.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Santo Trafficante
programme.desc: Florida and Cuba were ruled by top don Santo Trafficante. The King of Cuba's casinos was on the verge of mob stardom when a revolution destroyed his plans. It results in a secret alliance between the mob and the CIA and a failed assassination attempt.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Sam Giancana
programme.desc: Sam Giancana was associated with the Kennedys, Frank Sinatra and the CIA.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: The Killing Machine
programme.desc: The story of Roy DeMeo, a member of the infamous Gambino family who was suspected of heading a crew that killed and dismembered dozens of people.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Carmine Galante
programme.desc: The story of Carmine Galante, who made money from selling heroin, and still profited from his drug empire while locked in prison.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Joe Valachi
programme.desc: The story of hitman Joe Valachi, the first Mafia member to break the code of silence and turn public informer.

programme.title: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: The story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Hitler's Messiah Complex
programme.desc: Discover how a series of psychotic episodes in his early life convinced Adolf Hitler that he was a modern day Pharaoh.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Adolf Eichmann
programme.desc: This is the hunt for Adolf Eichmann, considered by many to be one of the main architects of the Holocaust.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Joseph Mengele
programme.desc: Examine how Mossad agents from Israel spent nearly thirty years tracking the notorious Nazi physician Josef Mengele.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Paul Touvier
programme.desc: French investigators hunt down Paul Touvier, a pro-Nazi sympathizer who was responsible for murdering both Jews and resistance fighters. This 'Hangman of Lyon' hid himself with the assistance of a right wing group associated with the Catholic Church.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Kurt Lishka
programme.desc: The story of German housewife Beate Klarsfeld and her husband Serge, who helped track down former Paris Gestapo chief Kurt Lishka. Lishka ordered the arrest and murder of over 33,000 Jews yet lived as a free man in Germany for years.

programme.title: Nazi Fugitives: Franz Stangl and Gustav Wagner
programme.desc: See how Nazi hunter Simon Wiesenthal tracked down fugitive war criminal Franz Stangl in Brazil. Stangl was responsible for the murder of over 800,000 people.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Area 52
programme.desc: There are mysterious reports coming out of Area 52, including vanishing aircraft, UFOs, and revere engineering of highly advanced technology that have convinced investigators that the military knows more about alien visitation than they will say.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Deep Sea Encounters
programme.desc: After decades of UFO research focusing on the skies, Unidentified Submergible Objects may be the next frontier of study. Newly declassified documents and first-hand accounts are leading researchers to believe that UFOs may be closer than we ever thought.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Pilots and Astronauts
programme.desc: Through amazing first-hand accounts from pilots and astronauts, we'll learn that sightings of mysterious, unknown objects in our skies are far more common than we're lead to believe.

programme.title: UFOs: Uncovering the Truth: Ancient UFO Earth Landings
programme.desc: There's new evidence pointing to the possibility that ancient man was visited by extraterrestrials, influencing ancient technologies, architecture and art. One scholar reveals evidence supporting his theory that ancient Sumerians were created by aliens.

programme.title: Insane Pools: Off the Deep End: Sliding into Neverland

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Paris

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Jamaica

programme.desc: Dipper feels self-conscious that Mabel is taller than him and is becoming the alpha twin, so he seeks out a magic way to grow himself the same height. Lil' Gideon takes advantage of Dipper's and Mabel's height discrepancies.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Deep End
programme.desc: When Mabel befriends a cute Merman trapped in the deep end of the public pool, she's determined to return him to his family in the ocean, even though that means her whirlwind romance will come to an end.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Big Hero 7
programme.desc: Hiro, Baymax and the rest of the Big Hero 6 team continue their journey to San Fransokyo.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Seventh Wheel
programme.desc: Professor Granville becomes increasingly pushy with her suggestions for Big Hero 6 as she helps them try to figure out a mysterious series of food-related burglaries.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: All-In! Judgement Joker!
programme.desc: As the Bey Carnival heats up, Arman and Ashindra take the stage against Joe Lazure and Joker; will they meet the same fate as the other Victories members before them?

programme.title: Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: A Grand Debut!
programme.desc: The Pokémon School students have one more research project to complete, and it’s sure to generate excitement and electricity for everyone!

programme.title: DuckTales: The Last Crash of the Sunchaser!
programme.desc: Stuck on a precarious peak, the kids secretly search the plane for the final clue about Della's mysterious disappearance.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Shadow War Part I: The Night of De Spell
programme.desc: After the family falls apart, Magica preys on a vulnerable Scrooge to finally acquire his Lucky Dime.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: The Inconveniencing
programme.desc: When Dipper tries to impress Wendy by acting older than he really is, he's invited to join a group of teenagers on a trek that leads to an old abandoned convenience store that could be haunted.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: This Is Your Backstory
programme.desc: Agent P realizes there is more going on with Norm than just a simple odd reality show to celebrate his creator, Dr. Doofenshmirtz.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Primal Perry
programme.desc: When Perry comes face to face with an Australian platypus hunter who wants to destroy him, he must find a way to defeat this villainous foe.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Meapless in Seattle
programme.desc: Meap returns to save Phineas and Ferb from his nemesis Mitch, whose real mission is to take control of all of alien-kind, putting Meap's world in danger.

programme.title: Phineas and Ferb: Act Your Age
programme.desc: The kids are all teenagers for an episode as a result of someone behind the scenes answering a letter from the mailbag. Phineas has a crush on Isa, Candace has given up busting, and Doof is selling inators for cash.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Rise: Spin! Advance! Survive!
Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: The Dealer of Destruction!
programme.desc: Professor Kukui’s big announcement is making unexpected waves with unexpected people.

programme.title: Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: The Secret Princess!
programme.desc: An emotional look into the past reveals astounding people and places, and nothing will ever be the same again!

programme.title: DuckTales: The Lost Harp of Mervana!
programme.desc: The family joins a zen mermaid society to find a missing mystery, but Louie is convinced the seemingly innocent mermaids have a villainous agenda of their own.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Baymax Returns: Part II
programme.desc: When Yama unleashes an army of destructive robots on the city, Hiro and his friends must don their gear and truly become Big Hero 6.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Northwest Mansion Mystery
programme.desc: Pacifica asks Dipper to bust a poltergeist haunting the Northwest Mansion, before he wreaks havoc on her fancy party.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Reckoning Ball/ Clubbed
programme.desc: Chip Whistler returns to take revenge on the Greens, but is forced to apologize. Andromeda and Tilly follow Gloria to a club where they must 'cure' her of her amnesia.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Boyz Crazy
programme.desc: Mabel joins a secret knitting club and is pressured by her new friends to gossip, but when she tells them that Dipper likes Wendy, she inadvertently puts Dipper's life in danger.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.title: DuckTales: Louie's Eleven!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: The Owl House: A Lying Witch and a Warden
programme.desc: When 14-year-old outcast Luz discovers a portal to a new world, she meets a witch, Eda, and a demon named King. In order to get home, Luz has to help them with a mission.

programme.title: The Owl House: Witches Before Wizards
programme.desc: Luz receives a map for a mystical quest from an ancient wizard.

programme.title: The Owl House: I Was a Teenage Abomination
programme.desc: Luz sneaks into the local magic school to help a friend and makes a new enemy in the process.

programme.title: The Owl House: The Intruder
programme.desc: Luz and King must defend The Owl House from a mysterious intruder.

programme.title: The Owl House: Covention
programme.desc: Luz learns about witch covens, but her lesson goes awry when she finds herself thrust into a witch's duel!

programme.title: The Owl House: Hooty's Moving Hassle
programme.desc: When Luz, Willow and Gus accidentally animate the Owl House, the house runs amok around Bonesborough.

programme.title: The Owl House: Lost in Language
programme.desc: Luz's pranks at the library lead to unintended consequences.

programme.desc: Jerry yearns for a massage from his new girlfriend; Elaine worries about her boyfriend.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: The 9:04 From Pemberton

programme.title: The Goldbergs: You Opened the Door
programme.desc: When Adam and Dana decide to attend their first school dance together, Beverly makes a huge deal out of it and decides she has to help chaperone the event. To prepare for the big night, Adam goes to his mother for advice, but soon regrets his decision.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: The Goldberg Girls
programme.desc: Afraid she'll be all alone in her old age, Beverly attempts to bond with other moms to form their own group like the TV show 'The Golden Girls,' while Erica gets annoyed at Geoff's romantic gestures, almost causing them to break up.

programme.title: 2 Broke Girls: And Martha Stewart Have a Ball

programme.title: Daily Mail TV

programme.title: Last Man Standing: Outdoor Woman

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild: Snakes Alive

programme.title: Jack Hanna's Into the Wild: Gabon's Primates

programme.title: Chicken Soup for the Soul's Animal Tales: Pet Project

programme.title: Did I Mention Invention?: Pop Up Greeting Cards

programme.title: Stargate: SG-1: Holiday
